name: Christmas Snow Punch
directions: In punch bowl, combine Hi-C Hula Punch, Sprite and ice cream.
Stir until well  blended and chill.
From: Spartan Holiday Cookbook Robin

name: Elly May's Wedding Punch
directions: Dissolve the gelatin in the boiling water in a large saucepan.
In a separate saucepan boil together the sugar and 4 cups water.
Add the pineapple juice, orange juice and lemon juice.  Cool.
Combine the gelatin and juice mixtures.
Pour into plastic containers and freeze. Set  out about 3 hours before serving.
Add the ginger ale just before serving.
The punch will be slushy.

similar.name: Easy 5 Fruit Wedding Punch w/ Ice Ring

name: Bobbing Apple Punch
directions: In punch bowl mix orange juice -- apple cider, pineapple juice and sugar.
Chill a couple of hours.
Before serving add ginger ale, apples, orange slices and ice  cubes.

name: Spice Party Punch
directions: Combine fruit juices.
Tie cloves in cheesecloth bag (unless you want to go fishing for them later); add to juices with other spices and sugar.
Mix well.
Let stand several hours.
When ready to serve, remove spice bag; stir well.
Pour over ice in punch bowl; add ginger ale.

name: Strawberry Punch #1
directions: Allow strawberries to thaw for a couple of hours in refrigerator.
Prepare  lemonade  and chill.
Combine all just before serving and mix until sherbet is  dissolved.
Place ice ring in to keep punch cold.

name: Strawberry Punch #2
directions: Put the sherbet in a bowl and pour the 7-Up over the sherbet.
Stir until the  sherbet is melted.
This makes a pretty pink punch.

name: South Pacific Islands Rum Punch
directions: Pour rums into container.
Add sugar and vanilla beans.
Stir until sugar is  dissolved.
Cut the citrus fruits in half.
Squeeze juice into the rum; then toss  in the shells.
Peel and slice the bananas.
Peel and slice the pineapple. Add  banana and pineapple to rum.
Cover container and let stand in a cool place for  two to three days.
Stir several times during each day.
On the day of the  celebration, remove pulp, vanilla beans and citrus rinds.
Pour rum mixture over  ice in a large punch bowl and let chill fo r a few hours.
Just before serving add chilled white wine. Decorate bowl with sliced citrus fruits and float a few  slices in the punch.
If you don't have a large punch bowl, add ice to the  container; let chill.
Add wine just before serving - float citrus slices in the  punch.
----------- Notes: I recommend a new 15 gallon plus plastic garbage can with cover.
Wash and rinse well before using.

A new canoe paddle makes an excellent stirring device. (The bonus is they can be saved and used for this again, or can be used for their original purpose.)  DO NOT USE a metal container (unless it is stainless steel). Due to the interaction of the rum and citric acids on metal - it would ruin the punch with a metallic flavour and the dissolved metals could poison your guests.

name: Whiskey & Orange Punch
directions: Mix orange juice, lemonade and Southern Comfort together in a large punch bowl and let it sit for an hour or so.
When ready to serve, add the chilled 7-Up.
Garnish with orange slices and the frozen orange juice ring (this helps to keep the punch chilled - you could use frozen o.j. cubes instead).
*Mom uses less when there are going to be kids around - they really like this stuff.

name: Tahitian Fruit Punch
directions: In large punch bowl, stir together juices and carbonated beverage.
Spoon sherbet  into bowl.
Serve immediately.

name: Holiday Fruit Punch with Orange Slice Wreath
directions: In punch bowl, stir together punch, orange concentrate and water.
Unmold ice wreath by dipping in warm water to loosen.
Add to punch, orange side. Garnish wreath with cherries.
If desired, add 1 to 2 cups vodka to punch.
Orange Slice Wreath: Pour 3 cups water into 5 1/2-cup ring mold.
Freeze 1 hour or until top is solid.
Slice 1 large orange, then cut slices in half and arrange petal fashion in 2 layers on ice around ring.
Pour 1 cup water over oranges and freeze solid.

name: London Town Gratitude Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Use two tablespoons of mix per cup of boiling water.
2 oz rum may optionally be added per cup.
Store mix in an airtight container.

name: Leontes' Fruit punch
directions: Mix.
Serve, in a punch bowl or in a gallon jug.
Can be heated.

name: Aztec Punch
directions: Stir together in a punch bowl with large blocks of ice.

name: Independence Day Punch
directions: Mix the booze and juice.
Add soda.

name: Lavender Punch
directions: Base for punch may be done up day ahead and stored in container in refrigerator overnight.
In saucepan combine water, cinnamon, cloves, and bring to a boil.
Remove from heat and allow to stand for 5 minutes.
Chill.
Strain out spices.
Combine grape and lime juices and mix well.
Just before serving, pour over ice block in a punch bowl.
Add ginger ale Garnish with grapes hanging partly over the edge of the punch bowl.
ICE BLOCKS Make about 2 or 3 days prior so they'll be frozen solid.
You can use any plastic container to make ice blocks up as long as the block will fit into your punch bowl.
I save my margarine, yogurt or ice cream containers to make ice blocks with as they work great.
Partly freeze 1/2 the container with water or ginger ale.
Add garnishes (e.g. thinly sliced lemon/lime or oranges, whole maraschino cherries, grapes, etc).
Fill container with water or ginger ale.
Freeze until solid.

name: Fruit Juice Cooler
directions: Combine all ingredients in large pitcher, mix well.
Pour over ice cubes in serving glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Cherry Lemonade
directions: Combine lemon juice and sugar; stir until sugar dissolves.
Cover and chill.
Stir in mineral water.
Serve with lemon slices and cherries.

name: Strawberry Tea
directions: Combine tea bags and boiling water in a large pitcher; cover and steep 10 minutes.
Remove and discard tea bags.
Add sugar and lemon juice, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Cover and chill thoroughly.
Stir in cranberry-strawberry drink.
Serve over ice.

name: Raspberry Cordial
directions: Combine raspberry, sugar, and water in a medium saucepan and cook mixture over medium-high heat until sugar dissolves.
Bring mixture to a boil and reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove mixture from heat, and let cool.
Pour raspberry mixture into a 1-gallon jar.
Add brandy, and stir well.
Cover mixture tightly, and store in a dark place at room temperature at least 2 weeks.
Shake jar gently once daily.
Pour mixture through a wire-mesh strainer lined with 2 layers of cheesecloth into jars, discarding raspberries.
Cover tightly.
Store at room temperature.
Use in beverages, trifles, or sauces.

name: Coffee Liqueur
directions: COMBINE FIRST 3 INGREDIENTS IN A MEDIUM SAUCEPAN; COOK OVER MEDIUM-HIGH HEAT UNTIL SUGARS DISSOLVES.
BRING TO A BOIL; REDUCE HEAT, AND SIMMER FOR 5 MINS.
REMOVE FROM HEAT, AND STIR IN COFFEE GRANULES.
LET COOL.
COMBINE COFFEE MIXTURE, VODKA AND COFFEE BEANS; POUR INTO A 1-GALLON JAR.
COVER TIGHTY, AND STORE IN A DARK PLACE AT ROOM TEMP FOR AT LEAST 2 WEEKS.
SHAKE JAR GENTLY ONCE DAILY.
POUR MIXTURE THROUGH A WIRE-MESH STRAINER LINED WITH 2 LAYERS OF CHEESECOTH INTO JARS, DISCARDING COFFEE BEANS.
COVER TIGHTLY.
STORE AT ROOM TEMP.
USE IN BEVERAGES, EGGNOGS, OR CAKE FILLINGS AND BATTERS.

name: Orange Banana Cooler
directions: Pour milk in a blender.
Add bananas, ice cream, orange juice concentrate and sugar.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve cool.

name: Wassail
directions: put all ingredients in crock pot.
Cover and cook on high for 1 hour then on low 4-8 hours.
Serve warm.

name: Peachy Spiced Cider
directions: Combine the first 5 ingredients in a slow cooker/crock pot.
Top with orange slices.
Cover and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours or until heated through.
Stir before serving.

similar.name: Hot Spiced Apple Cider in a Crock Pot

name: Moose milk
directions: Melt the sugar in the water, heat slightly.
Add Rum.
Heat to just steaming.
Heat Creamo separatetly to 145 degrees (well below boiling).
Slowly stir the rum mixture into the creamo.
Chill as quickly as possible.
Use a shallow bowl set in cracked ice (however be very careful that the drink is not too hot and cracks the bowl).

name: Crowd Pleaser Punch
directions: Mix together.
Add ice.

name: Champagne Fruit Punch
directions: Thaw fruit at room temp, do not drain.
Place fruit and juice in a blender or food processor bowl.
Add sugar, cover and blend or process till smooth.
To remove strawberry seeds, pour through a fine sieve or a sieve lined with a double thickness of cotton cheesecloth.
Put the pureed fruit in a 2 quart pitcher.
Stir in orange juice and lemon or lime juice.
The punch can be prepared to this point, covered and chilled in the frige overnight or till serving time.
Slowly stir in the champagne or sparkling wine, or pineapple juice.
Each serving can be garnished with a sprig of rosemary or tyme and a few cranberries.

name: Emeril Lagasse's Red Rooster Punch
directions: Combine all of the ingredients in a large plastic container; freeze for several hours.
It will not freeze solid but will achieve the consistency of a slushy.
Scoop into punch cups or wine glasses and serve.

name: Mulled Holiday Tea
directions: Place tea bags in a 4 quart dutch oven.
Pour the boiling water over tea bags.
Let steep 5 minutes.
remove bags and discard.
Stir in apple juice, wine and brown sugar.
Make a spice bag of cinnamon stick, cloves and cardamom in a double thick 6 inch square picece 100% cotton cheesecloth.
Bring corners to gether and tiewith a clean string.
Add spice bag to tea mixture.
Bring just to boiling, reduce heat.
Simmer covered for 10 minutes.
Discard spice bag.
Transfer tea to a heatproof serving carafe or pot.

name: After Party
directions: Mix all ingredients!
More or less vodka and sugar can be used.
Mix to your taste!

similar.name: Hungry Girl's Party in a Pitcher Sangria

name: Aztec Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients in a pitcher.
Mix thoroughly and pour into whatever is available, the bigger the better!
This drink packs a big punch, so don't over do it.

name: Thanksgiving for 10: Cranberry punch (requires a juicer)
directions: Juice cranberries and grapes.
Add vodka.
Chill.

name: Red-Wine Wassail
directions: In a large saucepan or kettle, combine the apple juice, sugar, almonds and raisins; slowly stir in the red wine.
Take a large piece of cheesecloth and place the cinnamon sticks and 24 whole cloves on it; with string, tie it up to make a small bundle and drop this into the red wine mixture.
Heat slowly over low heat; don't let it boil.
Meanwhile, make this unique garnish: stuff the centre of each apple with 3 tbsp sugar and stick each apple with a few whole cloves.
Spray a baking dish with non-stick cooking spray and place the apples in it; bake, covered, at 350F for 45 minutes.
Bake the apples about an hour or so before you want to serve the wassail.
Pour the heated wassail into a large punch bowl, discarding the spice bag, and then add the baked apples; they are a treat for those still around when the wassail is gone!

name: Southern Eggnog
directions: Combine pudding mix, sugar, and 1/4 cup of the milk in a 2-quart saucepan.
Add slighly beaten egg yolks and blend well.
Then add remaining milk; mix well.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a full boil, about 10 minutes.
Cool.
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; fold into cooled pudding mixture.
Add vanilla and brandy; then chill several hours.
Just before serving, whip the cream.
Spoon onto eggnog and sprinkle with nutmeg.

similar.name: Boozy Rich Eggnog from a Cooked Base

name: Green Elf (Party Punch)
directions: Mix the juices together in a seperate glass.
Pour the creme de menthe first into the serving glass before adding the mixed juices.
Add ice cubes.
To garnish, skew an orange slice and a cherry with a toothpick to decorate by placing it horizontally over the glass on 1 side.

name: The Rudolph (Party Punch)
directions: In a goblet, mix the juices together before pouring in the grenadine syrup.
Mix again.
Add plenty of ice.
To garnish, add halved strawberries, orange slices or red seedless grapes at the side of the glass.

name: Blue Twilight (Party Punch)
directions: Put all the ingredients into a tail glass with ice.
Stir well.
To garnish, decorate with a lemon or orange slice put into the drink.
This will also give additional taste.

name: SAFT GLOGG (Swedish Fruit Juice Glogg)
directions: Using a vegetable peeler, cut colored portion from orange in single spiral.
Reserve orange for another purpose.
In a large pot combine orange peel and the next five ingredients.
Let stand 4 hours.
Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce to low; simmer 30 minutes.
Serve hot or cold in punch cups with a few raisins and almonds in each serving.

name: Gin Slush
directions: In a large pot, combine all ingredients and stir well; put the lid on.
Freeze for a minimum of 24 hours.
This makes a slushy drink; it won't freeze solid because of the gin-- serve 1/3 slush and 2/3 Wink (a grapefruit pop); use 7-up or Sprite if you can't find Wink.

name: Strip and Go Naked
directions: Combine Pink Lemonade concentrate with beer.
Mix in vodka, and drink responsibly.

similar.name: Skip & Go Naked Punch (Aka the Pink Panty Dropper)

name: Orange Eggnog Float - (no alcohol)
directions: Beat eggs and sugar until light (no separation).
Stir in orange and lemon juices.
Put small scoops of ice cream in a punch bowl.
Pour ginger ale against the sides (inside, would be my choice!) of the bowl (to preserve the bubbles).
Add juice mixture slowly, stir gently.
Serve immediately.

name: Creamy Vegan Eggnog
directions: Place the ingredients (except the ice cubes) in blender and blend until smooth.
Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
To serve, blend the mixture with ice cubes until frothy (you may need to divide liquid in half to fit into blender with ice).
Serve in glass sprinkled with nutmeg.
*Mori-Nuis Japanese tofu that is silky smooth in texture and easier to digest than Chinese tofu.
It works well in beverages, mousses and other creamy-type dishes.
It is available at health food stores and some grocery stores.

similar.name: Creamy Eggnog Punch With Spiced Rum

name: Delicious New Year's Eve Punch
directions: take the two cans of hawaiian punch, the pineapple juice, and the orange pop and mix in a punch bowl stir and serve over ice.

name: White Holiday Punch
directions: Mix sugar and water in a saucepan.
Stir constantly over medium heat until sugar is dissolved.
Remove from heat, add evaporated milk and almond extract and let cool.
Chill until serving time.
Combine milk mixture and lemon-lime drink in punch bowl just before serving.
Add and stir ice cream, to break ice cream up into small pieces.

name: Middle Eastern Lemonade
directions: Squeeze the juice from the lemons and sweeten to taste with the sugar.
Add the orange blossom water and the mint, and stir or shake well together.
Pour a little into a tall glass and fill with water or soda and ice.

similar.name: Pomegranate Simple Syrup & Sparkle Wine Cooler

name: Raspberry Sherbet Hawaiian Wedding Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, mix  the drink and follow the can directions for the frozen juices.
After that, scoop in the raspberry sherbet into the bowl and mix it up really good.
Right before you serve, pour the 2 bottles of ginger ale or 7up very slowly around the outside edge of your punch bowl.

similar.name: Easy 5 Fruit Wedding Punch w/ Ice Ring

name: Frozen Daiquiris
directions: Mix together and freeze 8 to 9 hours in plastic (Tupperware) bowl.
Transfer to punch bowl.
Let it become slushy.

name: Rosy Red Punch
directions: In large saucepan combine all ing.
Mix well.
Simmer 10 minutes.
Serve hot in mugs with cinnamon sticks as stirrers.

name: Amaretto Slush
directions: Mix all well and freeze, stirring after 2-3 hours.
Stir again later.
To serve, just pull out of the freezer, stir it up and scoop it into a glass.

name: White Sangria
directions: Combine wine, triple sec, and sugar.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Add club soda.
Stir gently.
Add ice cubes.
Float fruit on top.

name: Atholl Brose
directions: Put oatmeal into a bowl, and mix with water to create a thick paste.
Let stand for ½ hour.
In the next step, the aim is to save the liquid- not the oatmeal!
Strain the liquid through a fine strainer or sieve into bowl.
Press with back of spoon to extract all liquid, and then throw away the oatmeal.
Mix the liquid with honey, and stir until well-blended.
Pour into quart bottle, fill up with Scotch whisky, and cork the bottle tightly.
Always shake before using.

name: Vodka Lime Slush
directions: Mix concentrates, vodka and sugar with 9 cups of water in freezer container.
Freeze until slushy.
Stir soda into each serving.

similar.name: Bud Light Lime and Vodka Punch

name: Frosted Coffee & Chocolate Punch
directions: Combine chocolate milk, coffee, sugar and liqueur; mix well; freeze til serving.
fill 4 tall chilled glasses with ice cubes.
dived coffee to 4 servings.
place orange wedges on rims.
voila.

name: Golden Easter Punch
directions: In lg saucepan, bring sugar and water to a boil.
Cook and stir for 2 minutes; remove from heat and allow to cool.
Pour sugar water in lg punchbowl.
Add juices and vanilla.
Add soda.
Stir well.
Add sherbet just before serving.

name: Cranberry Quencher
directions: Combine cranberry-apple and pineapple juices in a large container or punch bowl.
Stir in lemonade concentrate.
Garnish glasses with pineapple, cranberries and/ or mint if desired.

name: Tropical Punch (Sugar Free)
directions: Dissolve Jell-O in hot water.
Mash bananas in bowl.
Add Jell-O and remaining ingredients, except 7-up.
Chill.
Garnish with strawberries or other fresh fruit.
Before serving add chilled 7-UP.

name: Citrus Ice Ring for Punch
directions: It is best if the lime is as close in size to the lemons as possible.
Cut lemons and lime in half lengthwise; with cut side down, cut into 1/4-inch slices.
You will need a ring mold, preferably the kind with grooves in the bottom-- I use my tupperware jello mold and it's perfect.
With the rind edge down, stand slices up around circle-- 1 lime, 2 lemon, 1 cherry, 2 lemon, all close together.
Repeat five more times.
Pour in enough water to be 1/2-inch deep.
Freeze.
When frozen, pour in an inch more water; freeze.
When frozen, repeat.
Keep doing this until mold is full.
The reason you do this in stages is to prevent the fruit from floating.
To unmold, run cold water over the bottom; it will then slip out.
Place round side up in punch-- preferably Sparkling Party Punch (non-alcoholic), posted as a separate recipe here at Recipezaar(#24691).

name: Sugar Free Punch
directions: Prepare Sugar Free Lemonade according to their directions; Chill.
Pour Lemonade and Fresca in a punch bowl.
Add ice and garnish with fruit.

name: Louisiana Orange Blossoms
directions: First 4 ingredients should be chilled to cold.
Pour all the ingredients into a punch bowl; mix together well.

name: Easy 5 Fruit Wedding Punch w/ Ice Ring
directions: Pour all juices and water into lg. container.
Thaw,mix and chill.
When ready to serve, pour chilled punch in bowl, gently pour in ginger ale and soda water.
Add ice ring and garnish w/ strawberry slices and sprig of mint.

Ice Mold: Place lemon, lime and oranges slices in bottom.
of 8 inch ring mold, add a thin layer of juice mix and freeze.
When fruit is solidly frozen add more punch mix and freeze.
When solid, unmold by dipping ring in warm water.
To make ahead:Place ice ring in air-tight plastic bag and store in freezer.
Make as many as you need.
Keeps well for weeks.

name: Sparkling Lemonade
directions: In a large pitcher, combine cold water, lemon juice and sugar, stir until sugar dissolves.
Cover and refrigerate until chilled.
Just before serving, gradually add soda water down edge of pitcher, stir to mix.
Garnish.
Pour lemonade over ice cubes in glasses.
Garnish each serving with lemon slices and mint sprig.

name: Cardinal Punch
directions: Pour rapidly boiling water over tea.
Add spices and cover to steep for 5-7 minutes.
Strain and stir in sugar.
Add juices and cold water.
Chill and serve.

name: Picnic Tea Punch
directions: Bring 4 cups water to a boil in medium saucepan.
Remove from heat.
Add tea bag and cinnamon stick, and let stand for 5 minutes.
Remove tea bag.
Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
Stir in orange juice and lemonade concentrates.
Pour mixture into pitcher, and add remaining 4 cups water.
Serve over ice and garnish with lemon slices and mint sprigs if desired.

name: Bitter Lemon
directions: Cut the lemons into pieces, put in a saucepan with the water and bring to the boil.
Reduce the heat and simmer gently for 10-15 minutes, until the fruit is soft.
Add the sugar and stir until dissolved.
Remove from the heat, cover and cool.
Strain before using.

name: Summer Punch
directions: In large punchbowl, combine cran-raspberry juice and pineapple juice.
Add frozen lemonade and frozen limeade.
Stir until partially melted.
Add 7up, stir.
Add sherbert just before serving.

name: Tropical White Wine Punch
directions: In large punch bowl, mix cream of coconut and wine.
Stir in pineapple juice and liqueur.
Float a few ice cubes, and the orange slices, and strawberries on top.

similar.name: May Wine Punch With Sweet Woodruff (Mai Bowle)

name: Hurricane Punch
directions: Stir together all ingredients.
Serve over ice.

name: Slush Punch
directions: Combine first 5 and freeze for 24 hours.
At serving time combine with soda.

name: Pina Colada Cran-Raspberry Punch
directions: Mix together well in punch bowl or pitcher.
Add 5 cups crushed ice.
Add pineapple sherbet, if desired.

similar.name: Farmhouse Poinsettia Punch for the Holidays

name: Wine Coolers
directions: Mix it all together, and enjoy!

We usually made this by the half-batch, since we didn't have a punchbowl to put a full batch in; so for a half batch you'd mix a 1/2 can of limeade, 1/2 the 7-Up, and 1/2 the wine, but use still use all the orange slices.
You can use a red wine for a change of pace, but the white was more typical.
You can also increase or decrease the amounts of alcohol to soda pop, to your tastes.

name: Witches Brew
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large container; cover and chill.
Pour juice mixture into a punch bowl.
Serve over crushed ice.

name: Fake Champagne : )
directions: Combine juices, lemonade concentrate and sugar in a large container.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Store in freezer at least overnight.
Remove from freezer about 3 hours before serving time or until mixture starts getting a little slushy.
Break up mixture and place in a large punch bowl.
Add ginger ale.

name: Southern Comfort Punch
directions: Chill all ingredients then mix together in a punch bowl.
Float slices of oranges and lemons on top.
When ready to serve, add the 7-Up.

name: Red Satin Party Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl or punch bowl.
Just before serving, add soda ice cubes, if desired.

name: Pink Colada
directions: Mix limeade concentrate, coconut milk, and grenadine syrup in punch bowl.
Mix well.
Add soda water and stir to mix.
Serve over ice and garnish with lime slices and maraschino cherries.

name: Mojo
directions: Mix all together.

name: Bullfrog
directions: Mix it all together.

name: Bandolera Punch
directions: Combine liquid ingredients in punch bowl.
Float block of ice in punch.
Place lime wheels on surface of punch.
Serve.

name: Orange Sherbet Punch
directions: Add together orange juice, milk, sugar, peel and nutmeg in large pitcher.
Mix until sugar dissolves.
Cover and refrigerate.
Can be prepared the day before.
Pour sparkling water into orange juice mixture and stir to blend.
Scoop sherbet into large glass punch bowl.
Pour punch over and serve immediately.
Makes 12 servings.

name: Non Alcoholic Summer Cooler
directions: Combine all the ingredients except the club soda.
Stir until the sugar has dissolved.
Refrigerate for a couple of hours.
Just before serving add the club soda and pour over ice cubes (Or put a splash of soda in a glass and fill up with ice cubes and the sangria).

name: Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Mix the butter, brown sugar, and spices well and store in the refrigerator.
When serving, combine 1 tbs of the mixture with 1 1/2 ounces rum in a cup, then fill the cup with boiling water.

similar.name: Hot Butter Your Buns With Buttered Rum in a Crock Pot

name: Simple Red Wine Cooler
directions: Prepare the pink lemonade using 2 cans of club soda and one can of wine (or vice versa) instead of plain water.

name: Champagne Punch
directions: Mix all and serve immediately.

name: Raspberry Shrub
directions: cook raspberries 10 minutes.
Rub through strainer with wooden spoon; cool.
Add concentrate; stir in ginger ale.
Serve immediately.
You can float fresh raspberries on top.

name: Sherbet Punch
directions: Equal parts canned pineapple juice and lemon/ lime soda (7-Up) add Rainbow sherbet, about a quart per punch bowl batch, but depends on size of punch bowl.
If this is adults only, add one cup Bacardi dark rum.

name: Lemon Granita
directions: Chill a rectangular metal baking pan (15 x 9 x 2) in the freezer.
Combine all ingredients in a blender or a large food processor until sugar dissolves (~1minute).
Pour the mixture into the baking pan and freeze about 30 minutes, or until crystalls begin to form.
Stir the mixture with a fork to loosen crystals; the goal is to evenly mix the crystals in the liquid.
Break up any large clumps.
place the pan back in the freezer and repeat the above step about every 20 minutes until the consistency is that of crushed ice (usually about 2 hours, depending on the freezer).
Serve immediately.
This can also be stored in an airtight container in the freezer.

name: Watermelon/Citrus Splash
directions: In a 5 gallon thermal container make lemon/limeade according to directions on cans.
Using a food processsor or blender, process cold fresh watermelon (seeds removed).
Strain if desired.
Add the fresh watermelon juice to the container.
Stir.
If using a punch bowl an ice ring made with lemonade and lined with thinly sliced key limes and strawberries.
Float some on the top also.

name: Melon Punch
directions: In a food processor or blender, place half of melon cubes and orange juice; cover and process until smooth.
Strain into a pitcher.
In a food processor or blender, place remaining melon, water and sugar; cover and process until smooth.
Strain into first mixture.
Stir until combined.
Serve over ice and garnish with mint sprigs, if desired.

name: July 4th FIRECRACKER Punch
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients.
Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Chill until serving time.
Pour into punch bowl and add ginger ale.

name: Orangeade
directions: Put the orange zest and sugar into a bowl and pour the boiling water over them.
Leave to cool, stirring occasionally, then add the strained juice of the oranges and lemon.
Keep refrigerated.

name: Frosted Watermelon Wine
directions: Slice watermelon across longways and remove seeds.
Take out about a dozen or so melon balls (use a melon baller or if you don't have one cut out cubes) Scoop out the rest of the flesh leaving a 1" shell.
Mash the flesh (except balls) or process in your food processor.
Add lemon juice& apple juice.
Chill shell and juice mixture separately.

When ready to serve set the watermelon shell on the table (cut a thin slice from the bottom to get it to sit properly) fill with the processed juice add the bottle of wine and decorate with the balls, cherries, mint sprigs Serve in tall glasses over ice cubes with a melon ball, citrus slice or cherry and a sprig of mint.

name: Lemonade Fruit Punch
directions: Thaw strawberries and crush.
Prepare lemonade according to directions.
Add Vernor's just before serving.

name: Glacier Punch
directions: In a medium punch bowl, combine vodka, orange liqueur, kirsch and ice.
Slowly pour the sparkling wine, champagne or carbonated water down the side of the punch bowl and add sugar if desired.

name: Russian Iced Tea
directions: Bring sugar and cinnamon sticks to a boil with one quart of water over medium heat; simmer 20 minutes.
Remove zest from oranges and lemons, reserve.
Squeeze juice from oranges and lemons, reserve.
Remove cinnamon sticks and add fruit juices and zest, cooking 5 minutes more.
Remove from heat and strain.
Steep tea bags in 2 cups of boiling water; cool.
Mix together tea with fruit juices and 2 quarts of cold water.
Serve cold, over ice.

name: Macarena Punch
directions: Shake ingredients together in cocktail shaker.
Pour into serving glass.

name: Red Velvet Punch
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients, mixing well.
Chill.
To serve, pour chilled mixture into punch bowl and add the champagne.
Add an ice ring if desired.

similar.name: White Grape, Tangerine, and Asti Spumante Punch

name: Diabetic Fruit Punch
directions: Combine the chilled ingredients in a punch bowl just before serving.

name: German Erdbeer Bowle (Strawberry Wine Punch)
directions: 2-3 hours before your guests arrive, wash the strawberries,drain well and pat dry.
Halve the berries, then place them in the bottom of large punch bowl or glass pitcher.
Sprinkle the powdered sugar over them.
Rinse the lemon balm leaves and shake them dry.
Pluck the leaves from their stems and add them to the berries.
Pour one bottle of wine over the berry mixture, cover, and cool in the fridge.
When the guests have arrived, add the remaining wine and the champagne.
Lemon balm is an herb in the mint family common in Europe; if unavailable then use a vegetable peeler to cut about 5-6 long narrow curls of lemon rind in place of the balm (remove before serving).

similar.name: Deutsch Mai Bowle (Strawberries in May Wine Bowl) a German Tradi
May Wine Punch With Sweet Woodruff (Mai Bowle)

name: To Die for Lemonade!
directions: Pour the water, sugar, and ice into the blender.
Cut all the lemons in half.
Squeeze the juice of the lemons into the blender.
Blend for 45 secs.
-1minute or until foamy.

name: German Ananas-Mango-Bowle (Pineapple Mango Wine Punch)
directions: 2-3 hours before your guests arrive arrive, peel, core, and cut the pineapple into bite-sized chunks on a ridged cutting board to catch any juices.
Place pineapple chunks into a large clear glass punch bowl or Bowle pitcher, pouring in any of the pineapple juices.
Peel mango and cut into small cnunks and add to the pineapple.
Pour the Madeira and 1 bottle of white wine over the fruit.
Cover and chill until the guests arrive.
When the guests arrive, add the remaining wine and the champagne and serve.

similar.name: Deutsch Mai Bowle (Strawberries in May Wine Bowl) a German Tradi
May Wine Punch With Sweet Woodruff (Mai Bowle)

name: German "Melonenbowle" (Melon Wine Punch)
directions: 2-3 hours before your guests arrive, halve the watermelon, remove any seeds and scoop out the flesh using a melonballer.
Place melon balls in a large clear glass punch bowl or Bowle pitcher.
Halve the honeydew melon, remove any seeds, and scoop out the flesh with a melonballer.
Add the honeydew melon balls to the watermelon balls and pour 1 bottle of wine over the fruit.
Chill,covered, until guests arrive.
When the guests have arrived, add remaining wine and the champagne to the fruit mixture and serve.
NOTE: A very pretty way to serve Melon Bowle is to use a carved out round watermelon as the punch bowl.
You can use a knife to carve designs around the green shell, if desired.
If using the watermelon rind as your bowl, prepare Bowle as usual, only transfer the soaked fruit into the chilled empty rind just before serving and add the remaining liquid.
Set on a plate to catch any spills or leaks.

similar.name: May Wine Punch With Sweet Woodruff (Mai Bowle)

name: Wassail Punch (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Place water in a very large pot and bring to a boil.
Steep tea bags in hot water for 4 minutes; remove tea bags.
Add cider, orange juice, cranberry juice, and sugar to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar.
When it comes to a boil, reduce heat to a simmer.
Stick the cloves into the orange and drop into the pot along with the cinnamon, and red-hot candies.
Simmer the punch for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot.

name: Golden Punch
directions: Steep tea bags in boiling water for 4-5 minutes; remove bags.
Pour juices into large bowl; add sugar and tea and stir to dissolve.
Cool mixture.
Stir in wine and vodka.
Place ice ring in punch bowl and pour punch over; ice ring looks nice with mint leaves and orange slices placed inside the ice; float a large sprig of mint on top of punch and ice ring.

name: Lazy Lime Summer Punch
directions: Mix soda, lime juice, and vodka in a punch bowl.
Add sherbert and ice cubes.

similar.name: Frozen Texas Punch With a Punch

name: German Kinder Mandarinen-Bowle (Kiddie Punch)
directions: Place pitted and stemmed cherries into a large clear glass punch bowl.
Add the mandarin oranges, including their canning juices.
Pour in the orange juice and the mineral water.
Add ice cubes and serve immediately.
Tip: When making your ice cubes, you may want to make the cubes out of orange juice or place a mandarin orange or cherry into each ice cube slot, then fill with a little water and freeze.

name: Citrus Berry Mimosa
directions: In pitcher or punch bowl combine all juices.
Just before serving, add soda, orange slices and raspberries.

name: Three Citrus Summer Cooler
directions: In large saucepan, stir together water and sugar; bring to a boil, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes; let cool.
Stir in orange, grapefruit and lemon juices; chill until ready to serve.
Pour over ice cubes in tall glasses.
Garnish with a lemon slice and mint sprig.

name: waikiki hooker
directions: mix fruit juices.
stir in the wine then the vodka.
slip in the banana whole ;-).
enjoy!
a word of warning, this punch is delicious but potent!

name: Golden Punch
directions: Cut ice cream into 3 pieces and place in punch bowl.
Add fruit, 7-Up, and ice cubes and stir.
Note: To make yellow ice cubes, add yellow food coloring to water in ice tray.

name: Iced Tea Sangria Punch
directions: Bring water to boil in saucepan.
Remove from heat.
Add tea bags; steep four minutes.
Remove tea bags; pour tea into pitcher.
Add sugar to taste and stir until sugar dissolves.
Cool to room temperature.
Combine tea, fruit, juice and wine in a punch bowl.
Ladle sangria over ice into wide-rimmed wineglasses or punch cups.

name: Kid's Colada
directions: In a punch bowl, stir cream of coconut and pineapple juice until mixed.
Add ginger ale, stirring gently.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Pina Colada Flip (A Non-Alcoholic Tropical Punch)

name: Pineapple and Raspberry Cocktail
directions: Make the raspberry juice by whizzing together the raspberries, strawberries and icing sugar.
Press through a sieve into a jug.
Add about 100ml water to the sieve and push through the pulp to get as much flavour out of it as possible.
Stir in the lime juice and chill until needed.
Now make the pineapple juice by chopping up the flesh and whizzing in your food processor with the icing sugar.
Push through a sieve into a jug.
Add 100ml water and stir in the grapefruit, orange and lime juice.
Stir until needed.
Put a few ice cubes and a slice of lime in each glass.
Fill up with the pineapple juice, then top with the raspberry juice.

name: Mulled Apple Cider
directions: Tie small spices in a small cheesecloth and drop into the cider; allow cinnamon to just go on its own.
Heat mixture on the stove and simmer for at least 30 minutes before serving, stirring occasionally to agitate the spices.
Float orange slices on top of the cider.
Pour into mugs and serve, with a cinnamon stick, if desired.
Makes 1 gallon.

name: Witches Brew
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill.
Pour into punch bowl for display, if desired.
To serve, pour into glasses over ice, along with a slice of orange for garnish, if desired.
Makes about 6 quarts.

name: Rosy Reception Punch
directions: In a 6-quart non-metal container, combine water, juice concentrate, and Crystal Light; blend well.
Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
Just before serving, combine juice mixture and 7-Up in a large punch bowl.
Serve over ice, or float ice ring in punch bowl.
Garnish as desired (raspberries and thin grapefruit slices are a good choice).

name: Warm Autumn Punch
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Stud the whole oranges with cloves, and bake for 30 minutes.
In a large saucepan, combine the apple juice and cinnamon stick.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, and simmer 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, and stir in the nutmeg, honey, lemon juice, and pineapple juice.
Serve hot in a punch bowl with the 2 clove-studded baked oranges floating on top.

similar.name: Warm Spiced Rum and Apple Punch

name: Hot Spiced Drink
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a large pot.
Heat and simmer for about 20 minutes.
Serve!

name: Homemade Eggnog
directions: In a heavy 4-qt saucepan, whisk together eggs, sugar and salt.
Gradually add 1 qt of milk.
Cook and stir over low heat until a thermometer reads 160F-170F, about 30-35 minutes.
Pour into a large heatproof bowl; stir in vanilla, nutmeg and remaining milk.
Place bowl in an ice-water bath, stirring frequently until mixture is cool.
If mixture separates, process in a blender until smooth.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
When ready to serve, beat cream in a mixing bowl on high until soft peaks form; whisk gently into cooled milk mixture.
Pour into a chilled 5-qt punch bowl.
Sprinkle with nutmeg if desired.

similar.name: Boozy Rich Eggnog from a Cooked Base

name: Boston Club Punch
directions: Combine lemon juice, pineapple,sugar.
Immediately before serving, add remaining ingredients.
Pour over large chunks of ice.

name: Mai-Tai Punch
directions: Add requied water to the frozen concentrates.
Add liqour and Mai-Tai mix.
Makes enough for 2 punch bowls.

name: Bob-for-Orange Punch
directions: Stud each orange with 10 whole cloves; place in baking dish.
Bake at 325 degrees for 3 hours.
Combine sugar, water, 12 whole cloves and cinnamon in sauce pan.
Simmer 10 minutes.
Remove cloves and cinnamon from pan.
Add juices; heat.
Pour into heatproof punch bowl.
Float baked oranges in punch.

name: Sparkling Harvest Cider
directions: In punch bowl, combine apple cider, lemon juice and sugar.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Just before serving, add ginger ale.
Garnish with apple or cinnamon stick.
Serve over ice.

similar.name: Warm Raspberry Cider for the Holidays

name: Witches' Brew
directions: Process all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Pour into glasses and sprinkle with additional nutmeg.
Serve immediately.

name: Dutch Apple Punch
directions: Combine cinnamon sticks and chilled apple juice; chill for 2 hours.
Discard cinnamon sticks.
Combine apple juice with remaining chilled ingredients in a large punch bowl.

name: Peppermint Float Punch
directions: To serve, mix ice cream with peppermint extract and green food coloring in a punch bowl.
(Very carefully add peppermint extract, one drop at a time a little goes a long way.) Add 7-Up to ice cream mixture.
You can keep adding 7-Up to the punch if you need more volume.

name: Indian Summer Punch
directions: Stir juices and sugar together in a tall pitcher until sugar dissolves.
Add vodka and mix well.
Serve over ice.

name: Welcoming Wassail
directions: Whip heavy cream together with confectioner's sugar until soft peaks form.
Flavor with 1 TBSP Grand Marnier.
Set aside in refidgerator.
Heat apple cidar and brown sugar together in a large sauce pan to a boil.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat.
Add rum, brandy and remaining Grand Marnier.
Stir in spices.
Add lemon and orange slices.
Heat over medium heat for 2 minutes.
Do not boil.
Pour into champagne glasses.
Top each glass with whip ceam and freshly grated nutmeg.

name: Golden Cider
directions: Heat cider, apricot nectar, and brown sugar in a large saucepan over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Tie cloves in a square of cheesecloth or muslin with kitch twine.
Add clove sachet and cinnamon sticks to cider and stir.
Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 10-15 minutes.
Remove and discard the spices before serving.
Serve warm; may garnish cups with a cinnamon stick, if desired.

name: Passionate Sunrise
directions: Mix fruit drink and pineapple juice a large pitcher.
Chill well.
Add ice cubes, if desired.
Then add the grenadine and liquor if desired.
Stir.
Pour into cocktail glasses or goblets to serve.

name: Great Pumpkin Punch
directions: Serve in a hollowed out pumpkin with floating pumpkin chunks.

name: Homemade Sparkling Grape Juice
directions: Mix ingredients in a punch bowl or pitcher.
Serve cold with ice.
If the taste is too strong, add some water to the mixture.

name: Ty's Punch ;)
directions: Put the orange juice and pineapple juice in a blender or whipping pitcher.
Mix until fluffy.
Pour into punch bowl.
Add ice cream and pour ginger ale over.
Enjoy!
(you can add a few cherries too!).

name: Witches' Brew (aka Hot Spiced Cider)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pot (or"cauldron").
Simmer,stirring occasionally until very hot.
Serve in heatproof punch cups or mugs.
**Can also be made in a microwave,crockpot or electric coffee percolator (place spices in basket) instead of stovetop.
If there are leftover, it can be stored (tightly covered) in the refrigerator and then reheated later.
Remove cinnamon sticks and cloves before storing.

name: Welsh Party Punch
directions: Drain fruit salad and soak in 2 cups of brandy overnight.
Allow ice cream to soften before serving.
In a large punchbowl, combine the fruit salad/brandy mixture with 2 cups more of brandy and half a bottle of the gin.
Add one of the bottles of ginger ale.
Carefully spoon the ice cream over the top.
Sprinkle the nutmeg and cinnamon over the top, serve.
As needed, add more brandy, gin, and ginger ale.
Ratio is hard to describe, but it's about a 1:1:4 with brandy, gin, and ginger ale.
DO NOT ADD MORE ICE CREAM.
You'll ruin it.

similar.name: Taste of Heaven Pink Party Punch

name: Glogg Nog
directions: Beat eggs on low speed till blended.
Add sugar and spices.
Beat at medium speed till sugar is dissolved.
On low speed beat in softened ice cream.
Add the juices and cover and chill.
To serve, pour the ice cream mixture into a large punch bowl.
Slowly pour in ginger ale, stirring with an up and down motion.
Add an ice ring or ice cubes, if desired.
Sprinkle each serving with nutmeg and add a cinnamon stick stirrer.

name: Tropical island fruit sensation
directions: pour all in blender except the ice.
blend a few seconds then put in ice and grind all together and enjoy!

name: Orange Ciderrrrr! Punch
directions: Pour the cider, club soda, brandy, and the orange-flavored liqueur into a punch bowl.
Combine the mixture and add the ice ring.

name: Spring Morning Berries
directions: Puree strawberries, pineapple, and raspberries.
Add honey, sugar, and orange juice to pureed mixture, and blend.
Add ice cubes, and process until smooth consistency.
pour mixture into a rectangular baking pan (9 by 13") and freeze until firm.
Take ice cream scooper and'shave' the fruited ice.
Place shavings in a champagne glass, and fill approximately 1/2 full (to taste).
Pour champagne over frozen mixture.
Top with mint leaf, if desired.
*Verygood for breakfast or brunch!

name: Fire Punch
directions: Pour boiling water over the tea and steep 5 minutes; strain.
Heat wine and add tea, cinnamon, cloves lemon peel and juice.
Set sugar cone on holder, soak with rum and flam.
Pour remainder of rum slowly over sugar and serve.

name: Kahlua Party Punch
directions: Have all ingredients well chilled.
combine Kahlua with undulated apple juice concentrate and lemon juice.
Pour over small chunk of ice in punch bowl.
Add sparkling apple juice and club soda or lemon-lime beverage.
Add champagne and stir gently.
Add lemon and orange slices for garnish.
Kahlua, apple juice concentrate and lemon juice may be mixed and refrigerated the day before.
Recipe may be increased without adjustment.

name: Auntie A's Homemade Lemonade - YUMMMMY!
directions: Mix juice& sugar, then add 7 1/2-8 quarts of water.
YUMMY!
This one's hard to beat- and simple too!
You can freeze the lemon juice to make this anytime of the year!
ENJOY!

name: Ruby Anniversary Punch
directions: Mix ingredients and chill.
Prior to serving, place in a punch bowl and add large block of ice.
Use sliced lemons to float on top.

name: Eggnog Berry Punch
directions: Stir together the cranberry-raspberry juice, eggnog, and vanilla extract in a serving bowl, then stir in the 7-Up or Sprite.
Fold in the whipped cream (you can use a couple cups of whipped cream from a can as a substitution).
Sprinkle with ground nutmeg.
Serve and enjoy!

similar.name: Creamy Eggnog Punch With Spiced Rum

name: Non Alcoholic Korean Strawberry Punch
directions: Boil the water and sugar together, stir until the sugar is dissolved, boil ten minutes and let it completely cool (about 1 1/2 hrs) Place strawberries& ginger in a large bowl and pour in the sugar syrup.
Cover and put in the fridge for about 2 hours to chill.
Remove ginger and pour into glasses or punch cups garnish with a few pine nuts on top and serve.

name: Amazing Punch! Orange-Pineapple - Great!
directions: Combine first four ingredients, adding water according to directions on concentrate cans.
Add sugar, if desired.
Mix well.
If serving in a punch bowl, add ice& garnish with slices of lemon and lime.

name: vodka supreme
directions: basically just mix all these ingredients in a crystal punch bowl to create a relaxed summer afternoon atmosphere.

name: Pennsylvania Milk Punch
directions: Add all ingredients in a large bowl and beat until frothy.
Pour into a chilled punch bowl and serve.
Serves 25.

name: Shark Attack Punch
directions: Mix in a very large container.

name: Orange Lemonade
directions: In a large pitcher combine juices and Equal; stir to dissolve.
Stir in water.
Cover and chill.
Serve over ice.
Garnish each serving with a lemon slice.

name: Perculator Punch
directions: Pour apple cider into a percolator.
Place candies in percolator basket.
Cover, and begin the perking cycle.
When the cycle is complete; remove the basket, and leave punch in the pot to keep warm.

name: Kir Royale Punch
directions: In a punch bowl, combine Champagne and liquer, serve.
Garnish glass with frosted grapes or holly leave etc.

name: Orange Twist
directions: Fill six tall glasses with ice cubes.
Thinly slice the fruit, remove any seeds, and add a few slices to each glass.
In a large pitcher, gently stir together the juice concentrate and the seltzer.
(Do not overmix or the seltzer will lose its fizz.) Pour over the fruit and ice and serve immediately.

name: Hawaiian Punch-Punch
directions: Prepare the 2 (0.16 oz.) packets of Unsweetened Tropical Punch Kool-Aid according to pkg directions, adding water and sugar, then chill in the refrigerator until ready to make the punch.
Combine all the ingredients into a large punch bowl; and serve immediately.
This makes about, 22- (8oz.) 1 cup servings, or 44- (4 oz.) 1/2 cup servings.

name: Twinkling Ginger Champagne Punch
directions: In a saucepan, add sugar, corn syrup, water and ginger; mix well.
Bring mixture to a boil; lower heat.
Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
Remove from heat.
Stir in vodka; cool to room temperature.
Cover and chill 4 hours or overnight.
Strain mixture; discard ginger.
Pour into a medium bowl.
Slowly pour champagne down the side of bowl, stir gently and serve immediately.

name: Michigan Grand Sparkling Cherry Juice
directions: In a blender combine cherry juice, club soda, sweet/sour mix and one container of sorbet.
Blend until smooth.
Before serving, scoop remaining sorbet into glasses or punch bowl.
Top with punch mixture.
Garnish glasses with 2 stem-on cherries.
Serve well chilled.

name: Tennessee Spirit Punch
directions: Mix everything together.
Put in a container with a tight lid and freeze.
To serve, process in a blender.
Serve with a sprig of mint on the side.

similar.name: Frozen Texas Punch With a Punch
Bud Light Lime and Vodka Punch

name: Tom Collins Wedding Punch
directions: Mix together in large punch bowl.

name: Smorgasbord Fruit Soda
directions: Measure and put all ingredients into pitcher.
Mix well with wooden spoon.
Serve over ice for a fruity summertime drink!

similar.name: Low Cal Diet Soda Fruit Mixer

name: Cranberry,Apple Spiced Tea
directions: Put all ingredients in a slow cooker on low.
I usually do the night before and wake to the wonderful scents coming from my kitchen.

name: Gluehwein (German Hot Wine Punch)
directions: Mix everything together in a large saucepan and heat until hot but NOT boiling.
Boiling it will ruin the Gluehwein, so be careful to not set your heat to high.
You can pour this into a crockpot on LOW heat and serve warm.

name: Gramm's Christmas Punch
directions: Stir all ingredients together in punch bowl with HALF of the water required as directed on the label for each of the frozen juices.
Allow to chill for at least 12 hours.
If carbonation desired, add Sprite or Club Soda when serving.
Grammy always serves it with an ice ring floating on the top.

name: New Ginger Wine - Christmas & Holiday Ginger Wine
directions: In a non-reactive saucepan over medium heat, combine the lemon zest and juice, wine, honey or golden syrup, ginger, and raisins.
Raise the heat to medium-high, stirring constantly until the honey or golden syrup is melted, which will take about 4 minutes, but do not allow to boil.
Add the brandy or Cognac and place into glass container.

Refrigerate at least one day (or two, to taste), then strain the wine and serve in small glasses; it will be slightly cloudy but very tasty and very good for helping digest those large dinners everybody had!
Note:  honey and golden syrup have different tastes, and I like both.  It's nice to have the both versions of the wine with made, for different folks' tastes!

similar.name: Farmhouse Poinsettia Punch for the Holidays

name: Mulled Zin (Holiday Zinfandel Wine Punch)
directions: Preheat your oven to 350 degrees F.

Push the whole cloves into one of the small oranges until it's completely"studded," then place the orange in a baking dish and roast it in the oven until it's soft, which will take between 35 to 40 minutes.
In a non-reactive saucepan over medium heat, combine the roasted orange, zinfandel, orange juice, honey, brown sugar, 4 of the cinnamon sticks, nutmeg, allspice, and the brandy or Cognac.

Raise the heat to medium-high, stirring constantly until the honey is melted and the sugar is dissolved, which will take about 4 minutes, but DO NOT LET BOIL (the flavor of the wine and spices combination will deteriorate if the mixture reaches the boiling point).
Strain the mulled wine and pour into six coffee glasses or cups, slice the remaining small orange into 6 slices, and garnish each cup with a cinnamon stick and orange slice.

similar.name: May Wine Punch With Sweet Woodruff (Mai Bowle)

name: Nightcrawler's Delight
directions: Place Gummi worms in bottom of punchbowl.
Add liqueurs and lemonade.
Add 7-up to mixture.
Stir.

For optional ice ring, place in donut-shaped jell-o mold: Gummi worms, just enough to cover bottom of mold, 2 parts lemonade, 1 part Apple Pucker or Midori, whichever you prefer (the alcohol content is low enough that it will still freeze) Place in freezer 8 or more hours before punch is to be serve.

name: Holiday Rum Punch
directions: Combine ginger ale, juice, concentrate, rum and juice of 1 lime.
Slice remaining lime.
Garnish punch with sliced lime, grapefruit and orange.

similar.name: Farmhouse Poinsettia Punch for the Holidays

name: Wikked Queen's Milk Punch
directions: Mix together and serve chilled.

name: Apple Brandy Punch - Crock Pot
directions: Combine ingredients in crock pot.
Cover & heat on low for 3-4 hours.
Serve hot.

name: Cold Weather Punch
directions: Run through the normal perking cycle.
I usually increase this as I have a party perk that holds 40 cups.

name: Magnolia Milk Punch
directions: Combine ice cream, bourbon and vanilla in a blender and process until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses and sprinkle with nutmeg, and ENJOY.

name: Hot Spiced Cider With Calvados
directions: In a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat, combine the cider, cinnamon sticks, cloves and crystallized ginger.
Bring to a boil, reduce the heat to low, cover partially and simmer gently for 30 minutes to blend the flavors.
Ladle the cider into warmed mugs or cups, adding some of the spices to each serving.
Stir 2 Tbs Calvados into each mug and serve immediately.

name: Amaretto Punch
directions: Mix together and freeze.

name: Mocha Punch
directions: In large pan bring water and sugar almost to a boil, stirring until sugar is completely dissolved.
Add instant coffee, stir and cover.
Let steep until cool.
Add milk and chocolate syrup.
Pour into punch bowl.
Add the ice cream in small scoops and serve.

name: Citrus Cooler
directions: Add drink mix to a large pitcher.
Add water and orange juice.
Stir mixture until drink mix is dissolved.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Right before serving, add the diet Sprite.
Serve in ice-filled glasses.

name: Fog Cutters
directions: Mix all together, and chill, you can add sliced pineapple and maraschino cherries if you put in a punch bowl.
Enjoy, remember don't drink and drive.

name: Apple Cider Snap
directions: Boil together in a saucepan until candies are dissolved.
Garnish with thin slices of apple if desired.

name: Mulled Cranberry Cider
directions: Peel and juice orange; discard pulp, pith, and seeds.
Combine orange juice, cranberry-raspberry drink, and sugar in a 3 1/2-5 qt crockpot.
Place orange peel, cinnamon, cloves and anise on a double thick, 8 inch square of cheesecloth and bring corners together and tie.
Place the spice bag in the cooker and cook 2 1/2-3 hours on high (5-6 hours on low).
Serve in mugs while still hot.

name: 60th Anniversary Punch
directions: Pour 3 parts white grape juice to 2 parts 7-up to 1 part club soda.

name: Key West Citrus Coolers
directions: Bring 3 cups water and sugar to boil in large saucepan over high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Boil 3 minutes.
Transfer syrup to bowl; cover.
Chill until cold, at least 3 hours and up to 1 week.
Mix lime juice, orange juice, 3 cups syrup, and 3 cups water in large pitcher (Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill).
Fill glasses with ice.
Pour cooler over.

name: Southern Breeze
directions: Stir together first 4 ingredients in a 2 quart pitcher, pour evenly into 5 ice cube trays,a nd freeze at least 8 hours.
Combine pineapple juice and ginger ale, serve over raspberry ice cubes.

similar.name: Sarasota's Mango Lemonade With a Kick

name: Strawberry Limeade
directions: Blend strawberries and lime juice in blender or food processor until smooth.
Combine strawberry mixture, water and splenda in pitcher.
Pour over ice cubes in tall glasses, garnish each with strawberry or lime wedge, if desired.

name: Aloha Punch
directions: Add all ingredients to a pitcher; stir to mix.
Pour into ice-filled glasses and serve.

name: Tropi-kiwi Punch
directions: Take out your blender!
Put Pina Colada Mix in blender along with 2 kiwi and banana, and combine, mixing until smooth.
Freeze for 1 hour.
Pour 1/4cup of mixture into 8 glasses,making sure to do so evenly.
Add a scoop of ice cream to each glass.
Fill each glass the rest of the way with your chilled gingerale.
Slice up third kiwi and place a slice on top of each glass.
Serve immediately.
ENJOY!

similar.name: Mango, Passion Fruit and Banana Punch

name: Ya Ya Punch
directions: Mix all together in a small pitcher.
Serve over ice.

name: Pennsylvania Dreamscicle Milk Shake
directions: In a mixing bowl, beat milk, sherbet, ice cream until frothy.
Pour into a punch bowl.
Stir in soda.
Serve immediately.

name: Planter's Punch for a Crowd
directions: For each cocktail combine 2 oz of the above Planter's Punch Mix in a tall glass with ingredients listed above for one cocktail.
Makes 1/2 gallon punch base.

name: Pineapple Mimosa (And Kid Friendly Version)
directions: Combine pineapple juice concentrate, limeade concentrate, and water.
Chill well.
Before serving, carefully add champagne or apple juice.
Add ice or, if desired, Strawberry Ice Cubes to each pitcher before serving.
Makes about 3 quarts or 12 servings.
Strawberry Ice Cubes: Fill two ice cube trays with cleaned fresh strawberries (halve or quarter any larger berries if necessary).
Add water.
Freeze until firm.

name: Orange Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients.

name: Easy Hurricane Punch
directions: Mix all the ingredients together.
Serve over crushed ice.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Frozen Texas Punch With a Punch

name: Lime Cream Cooler
directions: In a large punch bowl, stir together ice cream, sherbet and milk.
In 1-quart pitcher, stir together lemonade concentrate, limeade concentrate and water.
Pour over ice cream mixture.
Add ginger ale; stir until slightly mixed.

name: Rum Punch
directions: Shake well over ice and enjoy.

name: Pfirsichbowle (German Sparkling Peach Wine Punch)
directions: Sliced peaches and drop into a pot of boiling water for a few seconds- just to blanch them so the skins will come off easily, not to cook them.

Pull off the skins and set them in the bottom of your bowle pitcher in a layers, sprinkling with sugar for each layer (one peach per layer)-amount is to taste, but probably 1 rounded Tbsp per peach is a good guess.
Cover and chill bowle pitcher 24 hours.
Have a decorative bowl filled with ice that your bowle pitcher will sit in to keep cool.
Nestle the bowle pitcher in the ice bed and pour in the chilled wine and the champagne.
Stir gently with a ladle and serve.

similar.name: May Wine Punch With Sweet Woodruff (Mai Bowle)

name: Fresh Orange-Lemon Drink
directions: In a blender, combine the ice, lemon juice, and sugar.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a 10 ounce glass.
Fill with club soda or Perrier and garnish.
Enjoy!

name: Great White Slush
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients.
Stir until dissolved.
Freeze until solid.
Two hours before serving, remove from freezer.
One hour before serving, mash.
Add carbonated drink.
Garnish with lime slices.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Cherry Lemonade
directions: In a GALLON jug (empty milk or water container), fill container about 1/4 full with HOT water& add sugar.
(This helps sugar dissolve immediately).
Add remaining ingredients, squeezing juice from the lemons& oranges as well.
Cut 1 each lemon& orange into thin slices (use the ones you previously squeezed the juice out of) and add slices into container.
(The oils from the skins add alot of flavor.) Fill container with cold water, shake,& serve over ice!
~Yummyyyyyy!

name: French 75 Champagne Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients, chill and place in large punch bowl.
Float strawberries for a pretty touch.

name: Warm Cinnamon-Orange Cider
directions: Heat apple cider, orange juice, candies and allspice to boiling;.
reduce heat.
Cover and simmer 5 minutes.
Remove allspice.
Stir in honey.
Serve warm.

name: Monster Slime Juice
directions: Mix juice and Kool-Aid, add water, stir and watch it turn green!

name: Green Coolant for Summer
directions: Boil lemon sized ball of tamarind with 2 cups of water for about 5 minutes.
Allow to cool and strain.
Mix with kiwi juice, add cumin powder and rock salt.
Add ice cubes or chill before serving.
Serve in martini glasses with Pringles anytime.
Tamarind paste or whole is easily available in all the grocery stores especially Asian stores.
Tongue tingling and very nutritious!

name: Percolator Punch
directions: Boil water and brown sugar to dissolve sugar.
Mix with juices and put in large percolator.
Place cloves and cinnamon sticks in the basket of the percolator.
Perk as for coffee.

name: Brandy Slush
directions: Mix together all ingredients except the lemon-lime soda.
Freeze.
To serve, scoop into a glass and add lemon-lime soda.

name: Wassail Hot Beverage Crock Pot Recipe!
directions: Combine all ingredients into crock pot.
You may use any heat selection on your crock pot and can simmer all day.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Hot Spiced Apple Cider in a Crock Pot

name: Boozy Rich Eggnog from a Cooked Base
directions: FOR BASE: In a heavy medium-sized saucepan, barely boil the milk with the vanilla bean, which has been split lengthwise, scraped with the back edge of a knife and added to the milk--seeds, pod, and all (if using vanilla extract, you'll add it after eggnog base has cooked).
Meanwhile, place a large fine-mesh strainer over a bowl set in a large bowl of ice.
Beat the yolks and sugar together in the top of a double boiler, by hand or with electric beaters, until thick and smooth, about 1 minute.
Whisk in the hot vanilla milk.
Cook in the double boiler set over simmering water, stirring constantly all around the bottom and corners with a rubber or wooden spatula.
In time, foam will subside.
The eggnog base is done when it coats a wooden spoon without bare spots, 12 to 15 minutes.
Immediately pour through strainer, stirring to cool.
When cool to the touch, slowly whisk in all liquors (if using vanilla extract instead of vanilla bean, add this now, too).
Store eggnog base in refrigerator overnight or up to three days, to ripen.
TO COMPLETE EGGNOG: At serving, remove vanilla bean and pour eggnog base into a large punch bowl.
Beat egg whites with 3 tablespoons sugar to stiff peaks; fold into eggnog mixture.
Beat cream to stiff peaks and fold it in, too.
Let some lumps of the cream and egg whites float on surface.
Sprinkle with nutmeg.
Serve immediately, using a ladle.

name: Summertime Slush
directions: Mix all ingredients together and freeze in large container.
To Serve: Mix 1 part slush to 1 part club soda or 7-UP.

name: Peach Slush
directions: In a blender, combine undrained peaches, nectar, and orange juice concentrate.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a freezer container and freeze for 3 hours.
To serve, spoon out slush into short glasses.
Add 3 ice cubes to each glass and top with Diet 7-Up.

name: Quaker Punch
directions: Bruise the mint.
Add the ginger and teabags.
Pour over the boiling water, cover and steep for 6 or 7 minutes.
Strain and discard the solids.
Meanwhile, heat the remaining water and sugar just until the sugar is dissolved.
Mix with the tea brew.
Add the juice of the lemons and oranges, and strain.
Serve chilled, over ice.
(I don't mind chunky drinks, so I don't bother to strain it the second time).

name: Cranberry Grape Punch
directions: Add the Kool-Aid to a pitcher.
Pour in the cranberry juice; stir until the Kool-Aid is disolved.
Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve (3-4 hours).
When ready to serve, stir in the club soda.
Serve over ice.

name: Nana's Punchbowl Punch
directions: Combine sugar, lemon, orange and cranberry juice and pour into punchbowl.
Add sherbet and ginger ale.
Serve immediately.

name: Passion Punch
directions: In a punch bowl mix first 6 ingredients add ice.
Just before serving add soda.
Drink up.

name: Refreshing Mojito  by the Pitcher Mojitos
directions: Place lime juice, mint and sugar into a pitcher.
Using a muddle stick mash to release mint oils, and dissolve sugar into juice.
Add rum and lots of ice topped with club soda. Adding more club soda to glasses if a lighter drink is desired.
Garnish with fresh mint and lime slices.

similar.name: Sarasota's Mango Lemonade With a Kick

name: Purple Passion
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher.
Serve over ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

similar.name: P.O.G. Passion Fruit, Orange & Guava Juice.

name: Pine-Orange-Banana Slush
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into 3 ice cube trays OR.
Pour into 13X9 pan OR.
Pour into Pampered Chef Ice Shaver containers (3).

name: Nescafe Jungle Punch
directions: Blend everything in a mixer for 1 minute.
Pour over ice cubes in a mug.
Serve cold.

name: fish house punch
directions: mix sugar and water together until sugar dissolves.
add remaining ingredients in a large bowl or pot.
serve in pitchers with ice and lemon/lime slices.

name: Sangrita
directions: Combine all ingredients except the tequila in an electric blender.
You may have to do this in batches, depending on the capacity of your blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve chilled or over a little crushed ice.

name: Picnic Tea
directions: Bring 5 cups water to a boil in medium saucepan; remove from heat.
Add tea bags and cinnamon stick to water; let stand 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags; add sugar and stir to dissolve.
Stir in orange juice and lemonade concentrates.
Pour tea mixture into pitcher.
Add remaining 5 cups water and stir well.
Chill until cold, about 4 hours.
Discard cinnamon stick.
Fill 10 glasses with ice; pour tea punch over.
Garnish each glass with one lemon slice and one mint sprig and serve.

name: Lemonade
directions: In a 1-quart bowl combine sugar and 1 1/4 cups hot water.
Micro and stir occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, 1 to 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, zest 1 tablespoon lemon peel (yellow part only) from 2 or 3 lemons.
Add peel to warm sugar mixture; let cool about 10 minutes.
Cut all lemons in half and ream enough juice to make 1 3/4 cups.
Add to sugar mixture.
Into a pitcher add lots of ice cubes, lemon syrup, 1 cup ice cold water.
Stir lemon slices into lemonade& pour into glasses with garnish of mint.
Taste you may want to add more water.

name: Polka Dot Punch Float
directions: Combine honey, milk, and spices in blender container.
Cover and blend at low speed for 30 seconds.
Pour into 4 tall glasses and top with a scoop of ice cream.
Top with sliced gumdrops.
Makes 4 servings.
Enjoy!

name: Ghoul Aid
directions: Mix all together, will be dark brown, black in color.
Refrigerate.

name: Yuletide Shrub
directions: In a large punch bowl, blend juices and concentrate.
Gently add club soda.
Garnish with lemon slices.

name: Frosty Lime Punch
directions: In large punch bowl combine pineapple juice and Kool-Aid.
Stir.
Add sherbet in scoops.
Slowly add gingerale or 7-Up.
Let stand 15 minutes to froth.

name: Copycat Dollywood Holiday Wassail
directions: Combine all ingredients into a large saucepan.
Bring to boiling, then reduce the heat, cover, and let simmer 10 minutes.
Remove cinnamon sticks and serve hot in mugs.

name: Mocha Punch
directions: Combine coffee and sugar with hot water.
Stir until dissolved.
Let cool.
Add milk,vanilla and syrup.
Chill overnight.
Just before serving, add ice cream and stir.

name: Jel's Pink & Green Lime-Aid Punch
directions: The ingredients for this recipe are measured in a empty 5-quart ice cream bucket (cleaned of course).
Pour thawed can of lime-aid into 5 quart ice cream bucket.
Add 1 to 2 cans of water to lime-aid.
Add sugar and stir until sugar is disolved.
Add water to top line in ice-cream bucket.
Put the lid on and put in freezer.
Freeze until solid, may take 2 to 3 days depending on your freezer.
When ready to use, place bucket with lime-aid mixture on counter at least 3 hours before serving.
Mixture should become slightly slushy.
Put half of the slushy mixture in punch bowl at a time.
Add 2 (2 liters) of cold cherry 7-up to the half of mixture and serve.
Repeat.

name: Marna'a Strawberry Margaritas
directions: Process strawberries in blender or food processor to small chunks- DO NOT Puree!
Add all ingredients to pitcher, stir, pour over ice and enjoy!

name: Rum and Champagne Punch
directions: Mix first 4 ingredients in large pitcher or bowl.
Cover and refrigerate until cold.
Place a fancy-molded ice in punch bowl.
Pour juice mixture over.
Add Champagne and party!

name: Fall Apple Punch
directions: Combine cider and ginger ale in a large pitcher.
Slice apple and float in punch.
Sprinkle with cinnamon.
Serve.

similar.name: Warm Spiced Rum and Apple Punch

name: Golden Punch
directions: Blend the bananas with part of the water until smooth.
Combine remaining water with remaining ingredients (reserve cherries).
Add banana puree and mix well.
Freeze for 24-48 hours.
About 2-3 hours before serving, remove from freezer.
Crush or mash frozen mixture GENTLY.
Pour over 2-3 Litres of gingerale.
Add cherries for color.

similar.name: Pink Palace Punch (With or Without Alcohol)

name: Almond Lemon Punch
directions: FAMILY SIZE TEA BAG AND 2 CUPS BOILING WATER TO STEEP, COOL.
ADD 6 OZ.CAN FROZEN LEMONADE
ADD CUP SUGAR OR SPLENDA
ADD 2 TSP.ALMOND EXTRACT
ADD ALL INGREDIENTS TO A 2 QT.PITCHER, FILL WITH WATER, MIX AND CHILL.

name: Nordine's Power Punch
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.
Serve in a tall glass.

name: Floating Hands Halloween Punch
directions: FLOATING HANDS:Water or juice, Pair of clear plastic gloves, Rubber bands or twist ties Pour water or juice into gloves, adding enough liquid to fill loosely but not so full that fingers will not move.
Fasten closed with rubber bands or twist ties.
Place on a paper towel lined baking sheet.
Freeze for 3 hours (water) to 6 hours (juice) or until firm.
Make more than one pair if you would like to replace the"hands" when they melt.
PUNCH: Combine Juicy Juice Punch and lemonade concentrate in a large bowl; slowly stir in soda.
Carefully cut gloves from hands with scissors and float hands in the punch.
When the hands have melted, replace with a new pair!

similar.name: Bubbly Black Punch With Wormy Ice Ring

name: Copycat Sunny Delight
directions: Combine all of the ingredients and stir until well mixed.
Chill well before serving.

name: Summer Iced Rhubarb Tea
directions: Add rhubarb to water and bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
Strain and add sugar to taste; serve iced with mint garnish.

name: Rum Slush
directions: Mix all ingredients; place in freezer; stir occasionally.
Serve in fancy glass with a straw.

name: Vampire's Champagne
directions: Vampire's Blood: Pour corn syrup into a shallow bowl.
Add food coloring, and stir.
Dip the rim of a clear glass goblet into syrup mixture.
(or champagne glasses) Turn glass upright so syrup drips down sides; let set for 1 minute.
To make Champagne: Fill prepared glass 3/4 full of seltzer.
Add a splash of cranberry or apple juice.
Serve.

name: Kathi's Fruit Punch
directions: Add your fruit juice concentrates (undiluted) to a punch bowl.
( just soften them slightly and put in, did not thaw them.) Fill with 7-up or Sprite or other lemon-lime flavoured pop of your choice.
Stir until concentrates are thoroughly mixed in.
Float desired fruit or ice ring.

name: Cherry Cider
directions: Combine cider and cinnamon stick in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer 15 minutes.
Add gelatin; cook, stirring constantly, 2 minutes or until gelatin is dossolved.
Serve warm.

name: Irish Coffee Eggnog Punch
directions: Combine first five ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
Beat at low speed until smooth; stir in whiskey.
Chill 1 to 2 hours.
Pour into a punch bowl.
Top punch with scoops of ice cream.

similar.name: Creamy Eggnog Punch With Spiced Rum
Boozy Rich Eggnog from a Cooked Base

name: Sugar Free Russian Tea
directions: Mix together all ingredients.
Place in a food processor and whir until well combined and very powdery, about 1 minute.
For one serving: add 2 to 3 tsp tea mix to 8 oz boiling water, to taste.

name: Mulled Spiced Wine
directions: Bring the wine, port, water, vanilla, cardamom, cloves, cinnamon, allspice, orange peel or whole orange cut in half, lemon peel or whole lemon cut in half, hibiscus flowers and sugar to a simmer in a nonreactive saucepan.
Or place in a slow cooker on low for 1-2 hours.
Simmer the mixture slowly for 15 minutes.
Strain and place into Heat resistant punch bowl or keep in crock pot and keep on low.
Place 1 blanched almond and several raisins or fresh cranberries in the bottom of each punch glass.
Pour the warm wine mixture over and serve.

similar.name: Old English a Hot Mulled Cider

name: Honuran Ponche De Pina (Hot Pineapple Punch)
directions: Peel pineapples; chop or shred.
Add water and let stand overnight.
Put in large saucepan with spices, sugar, and coconut milk.
Boil for 5 minutes.
Strain liquid into large pitcher.
Add rum and serve hot.
NOTE: If fresh coconut milk is not available, pour sweet milk over shredded coconut.
Let stand for several hours.
Squeeze through a cloth.
Woman's Day.

similar.name: Pina Colada Flip (A Non-Alcoholic Tropical Punch)

name: White Wine Wassail
directions: In a large pot, place water, apple juice concentrate, orange juice concentrate, apricot nectar, lemonade concentrate, and brown sugar.

Tie cloves in a small piece of cheesecloth and secure with kitchen twine and drop in the pot, leaving a piece of twine where you can fish it out or place them in a large tea ball (this prevents you from having to strain the wassail later).
Tie cinnamon sticks together with some kitchen twine, leaving some of the twine where you can fish it out.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 25-30 minutes, uncovered, stirring occasionally.
Remove cloves and cinnamon from wassail.
Add wine to wassail, and stir gently.
Garnish with apple slices, if desired.
Keep warm and serve from pot or you may decide to serve from the warm setting on a crockpot.

name: Creamy Eggnog Punch With Spiced Rum
directions: Scoop ice cream into a punch bowl.
Pour eggnog over ice cream, and sprinkle with nutmeg and cinnamon; stir in whipped topping.
To each glass add a shot of rum, then eggnog, one cinnamon stick, top with a couple of drops of grenadine and a cherry.
Serve immediately.
Stir, as needed.

similar.name: Fruity Almond Slush With Rum Soaked Cherries

name: Hot Butter Your Buns With Buttered Rum in a Crock Pot
directions: Put first 7 ingredients into crock pot.
Add 2 quarts hot water.
Stir well.
Cover pot and cook on low for 5 hours.
Add rum and stir to blend.
Serve from pot in warm mugs with a scoop of whipped cream and a dusting of nutmeg and cinnamon stick as stirrer.

name: Orange Eggnog
directions: Beat eggs until light colored.
stir in sugar, cinnamon, ginger, cloves.
Stir in orange and lemon juices.
Cut ice cream into small cubes into punch bowl.
Pour in juice mixture and ginger ale.
Sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Golden Mint Punch
directions: Wash mint.
In 4 quart saucepan, place 30-35 mint sprigs, sugar and water.
simmer uncovered for 10 min.
Chill and make sure all ingredients are chilled.
Strain mint syrup.
add lemon, orange and pineapple juice.
add ginger ale and sparkling water.
top with 12 mint sprigs and zest.
serve at once.

name: Christmas Tea
directions: In a 6-qt saucepan, boil the water, sugar, orange juice, lemon juice, and cinnamon candies.
Stir and boil until cinnamon candies are dissolved.
Add the pineapple juice and cranberry juice and cook over medium heat, stirring until the punch is thoroughly heated.
Serve hot. You can keep it in a hot crock pot for a party.

name: *holiday Punch***cheers!!!!
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a large punch bowl or a large stock pot(can be prepared the day or two before and freeze in a couple of large containers, take out of freezer 4 hours before serving).
Add 1/2 to a to punch bowl filled with lots of ice add 1/2 of the orange slices, ginger ale and rum.
To serve garnish each glass with cherry,and a cinnamon stick pour in punch.
Drink and be HAPPY!
Happy Safe Holidays!
I`ve also froze all the ingredients combined except for cinnamon stick with good results.

similar.name: Farmhouse Poinsettia Punch for the Holidays

name: Chocolate Lemonade
directions: Mix lemonade concentrate with water according to the directions on the can.
Stir in the chocolate.
Serve over ice.

name: Green Swamp Punch with Frightful Frozen Hand
directions: Spoon sherbet by tablespoonfuls into a punch bowl.
Mix 1.25 cups cold water with the lemonade concentrate; add to sherbet.
Slowly pour soda down side of the bowl; stir gently to mix.
Remove Frightful frozen hand from glove, and float on top just before serving.
Frightful hand: Wash any powdery residue from inside or outside of glove.
Pour lemon drink into glove until the glove is nearly full, but not so full that the fingers will not move.
Fasten opening with a twist tie.
Place glove on a lined cookie sheet (paper towel will do), and allow to freeze.
If using gummy worms, place in filled glove before freezing.

name: Mocha Punch
directions: Combine the first four ingredients in a large pitcher; cover and chil.
Pour chilled mixture into a large punch bowl.
Scoop chocolate and coffee ice creams into punch; stir gently.
Sprinkle with chocolate shavings.
You can also substitute 5 cups of coffe for the Kulua.

name: Champange-Strawberry Punch
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients; cover and chill thoroughly.  Gently stir in ginger ale and champagne just before serving.

name: Open House Punch
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients and stir well; add carbonated lemon-lime soda just before you serve it.  Garnish if desired.

name: Kid's Cooler
directions: Add all ingredients to a large pitcher; stir to combine and until sugar is dissolved.
Serve over ice.

name: Spiced Wine
directions: Warm through and serve.

name: Cherry Coke
directions: Blend and chill then serve.

name: Christmas Slush
directions: Steep the tea bags in 2 cups water for 3 minutes.
Bring the remaining 7 cups water and sugar to a boil.
Mix tea water and simple syrup together and allow to cool to room temperature.
Add the frozen lemonade, frozen orange juice, and the brandy.
Pour into an ice cream pail and freeze.
Stir once a day.
To serve, scoop slush into glass (half full) and pour 7-up or sour soda over to fill.

name: Mock Champagne
directions: Chill juice and ginger ale.
Mix together in punch bowl.
Float frozen strawberries in punch for color.
You can also freeze a ring of the punch with the strawberries to float in the punch bowl.

name: Mocha Punch
directions: In a large saucepan, bring the water to a boil; then remove from the heat.
Add the drink mix, sugar, and coffee; stir until dissolved.
Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
About 30 minutes before serving, pour into a punch bowl. Add the ice cream by scoopfuls; stir until partially melted. Garnish with dollops of whipped cream.

name: Peachy Slush
directions: Mix all ingredients together and freeze!

name: Taste of Heaven Pink Party Punch
directions: Chill the pineapple juice, ginger ale, 7-up and cream soda overnight.
Pour the pineapple juice into a large punch bowl.
Add the strawberries.
(I slice the strawberries) Just before serving add equal amounts of ginger ale, 7-up, and red cream soda.

similar.name: Pink Palace Punch (With or Without Alcohol)

name: Killer Champagne Punch
directions: Have all ingredients chilled, then mix together and enjoy!
Haven't made this myself yet, so am guessing at the number of servings.

name: Peanut Punch
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend on high speed for about 30 seconds or until thick and frothy.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Fruity Almond Slush With Rum Soaked Cherries
directions: Mix all ingredients together making sure the frozen oj is dissolved.
Put in freezable container in the freezer over night.
A half hour before serving put into a punch bowl and break up (I use my hand) it can be pretty cold.
It will be slushy!
Pour into glasses garnished with a cherry.

similar.name: Creamy Eggnog Punch With Spiced Rum

name: Pink Rhubarb Punch
directions: In large pan, bring rhubarb and water to boil.
Drain and reserve liquid.
