name: Ghoulish Punch
directions: STIR boiling water into dry gelatin in large bowl at least 2 minutes until completely dissolved. Stir in juice. Cool to room temperature.
POUR into punch bowl just before serving. Add seltzer and ice; stir.
ADD scoops of sherbet and fruit slices.

name: Amelia Island Punch
directions: PLACE drink mix in punch bowl. Add water; stir until drink mix is dissolved. Stir in juice.
REFRIGERATE several hours or until chilled. Serve over crushed ice.

similar.name: Governor's Mansion Summer Peach Tea Punch

name: The Ultimate Punch Recipe for Any Shower
directions: Mix all ingredients together and freeze in a large zip-lock bag.
Thaw 45 minutes prior to serving.
Add 2 liters of Ginger Ale and serve.
It will still be icy, but will melt as your party goes on.

name: Apple Julep
directions: Combine all, stirring well.
Chill.
Garnish with mint sprigs or lemon slices.

name: Ethiopian Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Garnish with Orange Slices.
Enjoy.

name: Airborne Mocktail
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice. Add all ingredients and stir to blend.  Garnish with an orange wheel.

similar.name: Dragon's Blood Punch and Hand Ice Mold

name: Salted Lassi
directions: blend all the ingredients except green coriander in a blender.
serve garnished with green coriander.

name: Fresh Fruit Orange Fizz
directions: In a large bowl, gently mix all fruit and orange juice concentrate.
Stir in carbonated beverage.
Serve in small dessert bowls.

name: Tiki Punch  Trader Vic
directions: Mix triple sec, gin and lime
pour over large pieces ice in punch bowl.
Stir and chill for a 1/2 hour.
At serving time add your champagne.  Use punch cups or goblets.

name: Tonga Punch Trader Vic
directions: Mix the ingredients in a gallon jug.
Pour in a punch bowl over chipped ice and stir thoroughly about 20 minutes before serving.
Add more large pieces of ice.
Float 5 or 6 Gardenias.
Serve in bamboo or coconut cups.

name: Copacabana Punch
directions: Pour the gin, white rum, vodka,champagne & pineapple juice into a punch bowl.
Add the diced pineapple, sliced orange, passionfruit pulp & mint leaves.
Add ice cubes to fill the bowl.
Stir gently to combine and.
serve.

name: Empty-Fridge Sangria Recipe
directions: Mix all but the mint leaf and let it chill. I would let the mix sit and soak for at least 30 minutes to enhance the flavor. Please note, the ingredients do not have to be precise. This is a hard to mess up recipe.
Pour over ice, add mint leaf, and serve!

name: Melon Melody
directions: Mix all of the liquid ingredients in the punch bowl.
Cut the melons into 1/2-inch balls using the smaller end of a melon baller.
Thread the melon balls in combinations onto 8 large cocktail picks or small skewers.
If you have more melon than you need, cut additional balls and float them in the punch for added color.
Add the crushed ice to the punch.
Garnish individual glasses with the melon ball swizzles and serve immediately.
***Note: Cream of coconut, not to be confused with the unsweetened coconut milk and cream used for cooking, is a thick, sweetened coconut product found in liquor stores and well-stocked supermarkets.

name: Blushing Orange Cooler
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients; stir until sugar dissolves. Add club soda to juice mixture. Serve over crushed ice.

name: Trader Vic’s Fish House Punch.
directions: Dissolve the sugar in a little water.
Add the remaining ingredients to a large punch bowl.
Add a 10 pound cake of ice. I told you a LARGE punch bowl right?.
Let stand 2 hours before serving.
Stir occasionally.
Keep the brother in law away from it before serving and don’t send him to stir it.
Serves 20 to 25.
And stay away from Fireworks afterward.

name: Jasmine,  Green Tea,  Fresh Lemonade
directions: Place the water in the reserve of the coffee maker.
In the coffee filter place an unbleached filter then place sugar, zest and the tea bags. All the sugar will dissolve and the lemon zest flavor will be picked up as the heated water goes through.
Pour the tea into a pitcher and cool.
Add the lemon juice and fill pitcher with ice cubes.
Pour into ice filled tall glasses and garnish with jasmine flower or lemon rind or mint leaves.
Enjoy and stay cool!

name: Fresh Berry Vodka Slush
directions: Mix everything together in a clean ice cream pail.
Put into the freezer.
Stir every couple of hours.
Once this is frozen to a nice slush consistency, spoon 45 ml.(or more) into a tall glass.  Top with club soda, gingerale, or 7-up.
You could substitute strawberries for a strawberry slush, but you'll want to use strawberry koolaid instead.

name: Pink Lemonade
directions: In a pitcher make lemonade as directed.
Add the tea bags.
Steep for 5-6 minutes.
Stir.
Add lemon slices and ice.
Stir.

name: Iced Tea Punch
directions: POur boiling water over tea bags;cover and steep 5 minutes. Remove tea bags, squeezing gently; stir in sugar and lemonade concentrate. Set tea aside to cool; stir in ginger ale just before serving. Serve over ice.

name: Red Corvette
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until the mix reaches slushy like appearance.
If using ice cubes, gradually add a few ice cubes at a time to allow the blender to crush them up.
Garnish with a strawberry and a chunk of Honeydew Melon on an umbrella tooth pick. With a thick straw, McDonald's straws work well.
WARNING: Do Not drink this too quick or you will end up with a killer brain freeze.
For a kid friendly version. Use Honeydew melon and strawberries to taste. You can also add a little watermelon, which works well in this drink.
You can make this in bulk and serve in a punch bowl, if having a group of kids or a girls night.

name: Cherry Sangria
directions: In a lrg pitcher, combine cherry juice blend, maraschino cherries w/their liquid, orange juice & lemon juice. Mix well. Add orange & lemon slices. Cover & refrigerate 2-3 hours.
Before serving, add club soda or lemon-lime carbonated beverage of choice & stir gently.
Serve over ice in tall glasses. Garnish w/additional maraschino cherries &/or orange slices as desired.

name: Juanita Punch   (Non-Alcholic)
directions: In a pretty punch bowl, combine the limeade and margarita-mix concentrates with the water and Squirt.
Add about half as much ice as you have punch.  If you like, squeeze a fresh lime or two into the mixture.  Sprinkle the punch lightly with salt, and add more to taste, if necessary.
For an elegant touch, rub the punch cups or glasses with lime juice, rim with salt and serve garnished with lime.

similar.name: Frozen Texas Punch With a Punch

name: Sinful Summer  Slush
directions: In a very large plastic air tight container add all ingredients making sure the liquid mixture is well mixed.
Place container in freezer for a minimum 24 hours.
Through out the 24 hour period periodically stir well allowing vodka to blend well
When you're ready to serve, spoon frozen slush into a tall glass filling 1/2 to 3/4 full. Top off with chilled 7 up and mix. Garnish with an orange slice or pineapple wedge.

name: Cool Breeze
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in an electric blender; blend until smooth.
Combine orange juice and pineapple juice in a large pitcher. Add rum mixture and grenadine syrup; stir well. Serve immediately.

name: Aunt Kathy's Mai Tai's
directions: Mix all together.
We prefer Bacardi Gold for dark rum.
I have used Bacardi Limon and Malibu Pineapple rum before and both are GREAT!
I have sliced oranges, lemons and limes and added for extra fresh flavor.

name: Green Wedding
directions: Build in layers in a champagne flute in this order:  vodka, melon liqueur, lime juice.
Fill with champagne.
Garnish with 5-6 leaves lemon balm.

similar.name: Easy 5 Fruit Wedding Punch w/ Ice Ring

name: Green Gator
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Pour in liqueur and rum.
Fill the rest of the way with pineapple juice.
Mix and enjoy!

name: Rose Punch
directions: Wash rose heads and leave damp.
Put each one in a ramekin or yoghurt pot and fill with water - freeze until hard (at least overnight).
Pour all the liquids into a punch bowl and add ice roses.
Scatter on any spare rose petals as decoration.

name: Sparkling Red and Green Tea   B-H-G
directions: Bring water to boiling.
Steep individual-size green tea bags in boiling water according to tea package directions.
Remove and discard tea bags.
Stir a frozen juice concentrate into tea mixture.
Cover and chill mixture until serving time. To Serve:
Fill a tall glass with ice and 1/4 full with the tea mixture.
Top with chilled sparkling water or club soda.
Garnish with a few fresh berries and lemon wedge.

name: Creole Brandy Milk Punch Cocktail
directions: In a cocktail shaker, combine the brandy, milk, and sugar with 3 ice cubes, and shake until frothy, about 1 minute.
Strain into a double-old fashioned glass with cracked ice.
Sprinkle with the nutmeg and serve.

name: Strawberry Ice Cubes
directions: Cut strawberries in half and cut the stalks off.
Place berries in ice cube molds.
Cover with water as you usually do when making ice cubes.
Freeze until set.

name: Bermuda Planters Punch
directions: In a pitcher, thoroughly mix first six ingredients.
Divide punch among six individual tall glasses filled with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish each with an orange and a lemon and top with 1 teaspoon of brandy.

name: Olive Garden Sicilian Splash
directions: Blend in order given.
Serve in a tall fluted glass with lemon slice and a straw.

name: Watermelon Lemonade
directions: Make a simple syrup by bringing the water and sugar to a boil in a saucepan over medium high heat.
Stir constantly until sugar dissolves.
Press the watermelon through a fine sieve with the back of a large spoon into a bowl.  Discard pulp in sieve.
Combine the watermelon juice, sugar syrup and lemon juice in a 2 quart pitcher.
Chill.  Add carbonated water to juice mixture just before serving over ice.

name: Strawberry Surprise
directions: Fill a 14-ounce glass with ice. Pour strawberries with syrup, and juices into a shaker and shake well.
Pour drink over the ice, and add a fresh strawberry to the rim of the glass.
Splash the soda over the top and serve with a straw.
(Use the frozen, sweetened strawberries that come in boxes in the freezer section for this one. Be sure to thaw 'em first.).

name: Pineapple Wassail
directions: Bring the water to a boil in a saucepan.  Add tea bags and cover; steep 10 minutes and discard tea bags.
Add the remaining ingredients in the saucepan.  Cook over medium-low heat for 15 minutes or until well heated.
Discard cloves and cinnamon stick and pour into mugs.

name: Witches' Brew
directions: In a heavy saucepan stir water and sugar together.
Stir in ginger, cloves, cinnamon and allspice and bring mixture to a boil, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes.
Strain syrup and return to pan (or put in crockpot) and add cider, orange and lemon juice and then bring mixture to a simmer (or put crockpot on low for a few hours).
Stir in rum or bourbon if desired.

name: Jamaican Ginger Beer
directions: Puree ginger and water in blender.
Let it sit for a day.
Add sugar & mix (add more or less sugar based on your taste).
Best served with crushed ice.

name: Marley's Mulled Cider
directions: With cloves and allspice in a teaball, cook all ingredients in a Crockpot on low 2-8 hours. Stir occasionally/rarely to dissolve sugar. Or cook in a pan on the stovetop on low heat 20-30 minute until it simmers.
Add 1 1/2 oz. Bacardi Gold Rum (MUST be Bacardi, accept no substitutes) per mugful when poured, if desired. Don't cook it with the Rum.

name: Dragon's Blood Punch and Hand Ice Mold
directions: You will also need:  1 lb coffee, can washed and rinsed.

To make the hand, fill rubber glove with water. Tie at the wrist with string and freeze one or two days. Unmold. Sometimes a finger will fall off when unmolding, this only adds to the ghoulish effect.
To make a base for the hand, fill coffee can about 1/3 full with water. Insert the hand and freeze until firm. To remove, run water on the outside of can.

When ready to serve pour half the chilled juices and ginger ale into the punch bowl. Insert hand ice mold in the center. Fill bowl with remaining juices and soda. For added effect, place a few drops of red food coloring on the tips of the fingers just before serving.

name: Midori Punch
directions: (I like to start out with everything chilled).
Mix all ingredients into a punch bowl.

name: Frozen Texas Punch With a Punch
directions: Make simple syrup boiling 1 & 1/2 cups sugar and 1 cup water for 3 minutes, cool completely.
Use only 1 & 1/2 cans of the limeade.
Mix all ingredients in large container and add 5 cans of water using the large lemonade can (60 oz of water).
Freeze.
Stir after 8 hours.
Keep frozen for a slush.

name: Delightful Cranberry Lemonade
directions: Pour into a large glass filled with ice.
Garnish with lemon slice.

name: Pina Colada
directions: Simply blend together all the ingredients in a blender or smoothie maker.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: Pina Colada Flip (A Non-Alcoholic Tropical Punch)

name: Orange Lush Drink
directions: Combine juices and sugar and mix well.
Allow to sit for 10-15 minutes and stir again.
Immediately before serving, place this mixture in your punch bowl and slowly add the club soda.

name: Pink Fizz-Slush Punch
directions: Combine the lemonade, champagne and 2 bottles of Sprite in an airtight container.
Freeze overnight.
Before serving, remove punch from freezer and allow it to sit for 10-15 minutes on counter.
Place this mixture in your punch bowl.
Before serving, slowly add the remaining bottle of Sprite and stir until slushy.

name: Red Coffee
directions: Stir cranapple juice, brown sugar, pineapple juice and water together in a large percolator.
Put cinnamon sticks in the basket and turn on.
Makes 15 cups.

name: Ghostly Green Brew
directions: Allow sherbet to melt for about 1 hour in bottom of punch bowl.
Pour ginger ale over and stir until all sherbet is dissolved.

name: Creepy Crawler Punch
directions: For Ice Ring:.
Arrange gummy worms in the bottom of 5-cup ring mold; fill mold with sports drink.  Freeze until solid, 8 hours or overnight.
Cook and stir corn syrup and water in medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add cinnamon sticks, cloves, and allspice; stir gently.
Bring to a boil then immediately reduce heat to a simmer.  Simmer 10 minutes.
Refrigerate, covered, until chilled.
Remove cinnamon sticks and strain out cloves; discard.
Combine syrup mixture with juices and ginger ale in a large punch bowl.
Unmold Creepy Crawler Ring by dipping bottom of mold briefly in hot water; add to punch bowl.

name: Spicy Swedish Tea
directions: Thoroughly wash and scald a 40 cup electric percolator.  Line the coffee ground container with  cheese cloth or a coffee filter.
Combine the first 5 ingrdients and place in the coffee container.
In the bottom of the percolator combine the rest. Perk.  Serve hot.
If you do not have a large coffee maker, use a saucepan and wrap the first five in cheesecloth then add to the cranberry tea mix.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
Remove the cheesecloth items and toss out.
Serve the beverage hot.

name: Tahitian Punch
directions: Mix all the liquids together.
Halve the bvanilla bean and scrape the seeds into the mixtures.
Quarter the limes and them to the mixture.
Chill for at least 6 hours to allow the flavors to ripen.

name: Gluhwein
directions: Into the pot, pour the wine.
add the cinnamon sticks.
Cut the Lemon and the Orange in half. Take the whole cloves and insert them into the RIND of the fruits 5 in each half. add to the wine.
Bring just to a boil and then reduce to low and simmer, COVERED for about 45 minutes.
Turn off heat and remove from hot burner.
Remove lemon and orange halves,remove cloves and then squeeze the juices back into the wine.
You then add the RUM and stir it into the wine.  You can either add the sugar to the whole pot or add sugar to taste to each mug or heat proof glass.
This will make you sleepy, so do not drive after you have consumed this drink.
This is a stay at home and get comfy and feel warm all over drink.
Unused portions can be kept in the fridge for up to 3 months and reheated as you wish. (Stove or Micro wave).
Put pot back on very very low burner to keep warm or use an alcohol burner to keep it hot.

name: Witches Brew
directions: In punch bowl, stir together sweetened condensed milk and pineapple juice.
Add orange soda.
Top with sherbet (optional) and serve over ice (optional).
Store leftovers covered in refrigerator.

name: Children's Raspberry 'mojito' (Nonalcoholic)
directions: Muddle sugar & mint in a cocktail shaker.
Add lime juice, cranraspberry juice, syrup & ice. Shake well.
Pour into tall glasses, top with soda & stir.  Garnish with mint.

name: Sea Moss Punch
directions: blend of the ingredient's in blender till smooth.
serve over ice.

name: Coral Cooler
directions: Mix pineapple juice, soda pop and cherry juice in a large pitcher with ice.
Serve with maraschino cherry in each glass or float in the pitcher.

similar.name: Fruity Almond Slush With Rum Soaked Cherries

name: Sea Moss Punch Diet- No Sugar
directions: blend everything together till smooth. serve over ice.
xylitol is a sugar substitute- natural and safe for diabetics.known as a birch sugar, wood sugar, alcohol sugar.

name: Sea Moss- Vegan No Sugar
directions: blend all together serve over the ice.

similar.name: Sea Moss Punch Diet- No Sugar

name: Soursop Punch- Vegan- No Sugar
directions: blend all together,
serve over the ice.

name: Peanut Punch- Vegan- No Sugar
directions: blend all together, serve over the ice.

name: Titanic's 1st Class Menu: Punch Romaine
directions: Simple Syrup:

In a large saucepan, combine the sugar and water. Cook over medium heat, stirring gently until sugar is dissolved. Bring to a boil and cook 1 minute or until syrup is clear. Remove from the heat and cool.
Makes 2 cups-Syrup can be stored in a sterilized container in the refrigerator for up to one month.
In a blender combine the crushed ice,  1 cup simple syrup, champagne, white wine, orange juice, and lemon juice. Blend until mixture is well combined.
Spoon the mixture into individual dessert cups. Drizzle with rum, if desired, and garnish with a sliver of orange peel. serve immediately.

name: Cranberry Wassail (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Mix all ingredients, except for the garnishes. (If you are iffy on the sugar, add it last, a little at a time and taste as you go along).
Heat the mix to boiling in a large saucepan, reduce the heat and allow it to simmer for 10 minutes.
Strain the wassail to remove the spices.
Serve very warm in a heat-proof punch bowl and garnish with the orange slices and cloves.

name: Summer Sun Cooler
directions: In very large pitcher, combine punch and lemonade concentrate; stir until dissolved.
Add grape juice and chill until ready to serve.
Pour into a large ice-filled container and put the lemon slices inches
Keep in the cooler if transporting to the hot beach!

name: Hot Cranberry Drink
directions: Combine ingredients in a large saucepan.
Stir to dissolve sugar.
Heat over low heat for 15 minutes.
Serve hot.

similar.name: Sparkling Cranberry Kiss  Taste of Home

name: Diabetic Mock Sangria
directions: In a large bowl or pitcher, stir together chilled orange juice, white grape juice, and cranberry juice.
Add the lemon-lime beverage; stir gently.
Fill each of 10 glasses about two-thirds full with ice.
Divide fruit among glasses.
Pour juice mixture into glasses and stir gently.
Garnish with fresh mint sprigs. Makes 10 (about 6-ounce) servings.

name: "moose Milk"
directions: Mix ingredients in a punchbowl, adding nutmeg last, and to taste.
Enjoy!

name: Mulled Cherry-Cranberry Warmer
directions: Combine cranberry juice, water, Splenda, and Kool-aid in a medium saucepan.
Add the cinnamon sticks and cloves and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
Remove the spices with a slotted spoon.  Discard cloves and reserve cinnamon sticks for garnish.
Garnish with cinnamon sticks and orange slices and serve immediately.

name: Hot Toddy
directions: In a coffee cup, assemble base ingredients.
Add boiling water, stir and serve --
Warms you right up!

name: Two-Ingredient Wassail (Easy!)
directions: In stockpot, heat cider and candies on medium heat, stirring occasionally, until candies dissolve.

name: Weight Watchers Mulled Apple-Cranberry Cider
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
Bring to a slow boil over medium-high heat and then reduce heat to simmer.
Simmer for 15 minutes and then strain into mugs.
Yields about 1 cup per serving.

name: Poinsettia Punch
directions: Chill champagne well.
Once champagne is chilled, tir all liquid ingredients together in a 2 quart pitcher immediately before serving.
Serve in champagne flutes with a fresh cranberry at the bottom.

name: Ti' Punch - Martinique, Guadeloupe
directions: Pour the syrup or sugar in a glass.
Squeeze half of lime into a glass. After squeezing go ahead and drop it into the glass. Cut a slice from the unused half and use to garnish the rim of the glass.
Add the rum and swirl the glass slowly with love.
Breathe in the sweet perfume which arises and let yourself soak up the flavours of Les Antilles.
Your punch is almost ready, all that is left now is to sip it slowly among friends and  --  with moderation! Seriously one of these is enough if you don't intend to be comatose before the meal.

name: Winter Wassail
directions: Pour cider into large kettle, add spices and salt. Bring to a hard boil, reduce heat and simmer 15 minutes
Remove from stove, add sugar to taste, if needed.
Cool. Strain wassail. Keep in a cool place till ready to use, but it is not necessary to refrigerate.
To prepare a wassail bowl: Use a heavy china bowl, a crock pot or a punch bowl.
Heat it over a large kettle of boiling water. Add lemon and orange slices.
When warm, add gin or vodka and let it heat, but do not boil or spirits will evaporate. Remove from heat.
Pour in the boiling wassail. If possible keep the bowl hot over a candle or alcohol burner. Ladle into punch cups and serve.

name: Santa's Kiss Christmas Punch
directions: Stir together.
Sprinkle with crushed peppermint candy.
Decorate punch bowl with candy canes.

name: Zeta Phi Beta Berry Blue Punch
directions: Mix the sugar and koolaid with the soda in a large punch bowl.
Stir well to make sure the powder dissolves.
Stir in scoops of the vanilla ice cream.

name: Diabetic Cranberry Soul-Warming Tea
directions: Combine the first 3 ingredients in a 1 quart container, add boiling water.
Cover and steep for 5 minutes.
Pour the mixture through a wire mesh strainer into a large container, discarding the tea bags and spices.
In a large crock pot or Dutch oven, pour the mixture in and stir in the sugar and remaining ingredients.
Heat on low until hot and serve with an orange slice, if desired.

name: George Washington's Eggnog [ I'm Not Kidding!]
directions: MIX LIQUOR FIRST.
Separate yolks and whites of the eggs*.
Add sugar to beaten yolks and mix well.
Add combined liquors to the yolk and sugar mixture, drop by drop at first, slowly beating it all the while.
Add cream and milk and mix thoroughly.
Beat the egg whites* until stiff and gently fold these into cream liquor and yolk mixture.
Let this sit in the refrigerator for several days.
Taste frequently.
*I always remove the white thingum from eggs.

similar.name: Boozy Rich Eggnog from a Cooked Base

name: Greenbrier Tropical Lemonade
directions: Stir all the ingredients together in a large container.
Sweeten to taste, if necessary.
Serve over ice.

name: Pat Nixon's White House Punch
directions: Mix all together, except ginger ale. Just before serving, add the chilled ginger ale.
This was served by Mrs. Pat Nixon at the White House.

name: Ethel Kennedy's Punch
directions: Mix all together in a large punch boal.
Serve cold.

name: Sheep's Sorrel Tea
directions: Boil the water in a 3-quart pan. Toss in the Violet Wood Sorrel and allow the blend to boil really hard until the brew turns deep purple in color.
Strain out all the leaves and stems and return the liquid to a slow boil, dissolving the honey until the desired sweetness is achieved. (Sugar or sorghum molasses can also be used as a sweetener).
Remove from the heat, pour the liquid into a clean jar and refrigerate until it is very cold.
Serve ice cold with no ice cubes.

name: Christmas Champagne
directions: Place cherries and caster sugar into glasses.
Crush together with wooden pestal.
Add a nip of grappa.
Top up with Italian sparkling wine.

name: Crock Pot Spiced Rum Cider
directions: Tie cinnamon, allspice, and cloves in spice bag or cheesecloth.
In a crock pot, combine spice bag, apple juice, rum and brown sugar.
Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 3 to 4 hours.
Discard spice bag.
Ladle hot punch into cups; float about 1/2 teaspoon of butter on top of the cider in each cup.

similar.name: Hot Spiced Apple Cider in a Crock Pot

name: Splenda Pink Lemonade
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher.
Garnish with mint leaves and orange or lemon slices.
Serve over ice.

name: Mulled Pomegranate Cider
directions: Place cinnamon sticks and cloves in the center of an 8-inch square of cheesecloth; tie with string.
Bring spice bag, sugar, and the next 3 ingredients to a boil in a large pot, stirring occasionally.
Decrease heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
Remove spice bag (discard); stir in orange juice; serve hot or cold.

name: Apple Cider and Ginger Ale
directions: Mix in a punch bowl.
Or serve per glass, filling the glass half full of cider and topping it off with the ginger ale.

name: Apple Creamy
directions: In a blender, blend pie filling till smooth.
In a large pan, combine apple pie filling, half and half, ginger ale, one cup cider, brown sugar and apple pie spice; mix well.
Simmer over low heat till mixture is steamy, but do not boil!
Mix whipped topping with 2 tablespoons apple cider and set aside.
To prepare STREUSEL TOPPING:
In small bowl, combine brown sugar, sugar, walnuts and cinnamon.  Stir in butter and blend till mixture is crumbly.
Pour apple creamy into mugs.
Top with serving of Cool Whip and a sprinkle of streusel topping.

name: Yucca Flats
directions: Mix all well. The rinds will soak up the alcohol over time. Depending on who's drinking I will use with small or medium sized bottles but they must be of equal size.
I also traditionally use sprite as my mixer just for the gentle fizz.

name: Passionfruit Syrup
directions: Put water and sugar into saucepan and boil for 5 minutes.
Add the passionfruit pulp, lemon juice and tartaric acid.
Boil for another 3 minutes then take off heat.
Strain out seeds and pulp, and pour the mixture into a clean bottle.
Keep the bottle of sauce in the refrigerator and use it within a month.

name: Smoking Bishop
directions: Wash the fruit and bake it on a foil lined baking sheet until it becomes pale brown, turning once.
Heat a large earthenware bowl and add the fruit. Stud each fruit with five cloves.
Add the sugar and the red wine, and store covered in a warm place for about a day.
Squeeze the fruit to extract the juice, and strain into a saucepan.
Add the port and warm thoroughly, but don't boil.
Serve in heated glasses.
Note: There are many suggestions for variations in this recipe, including the addition of star anise and cinnamon sticks.
There was also a suggestion to bring the mix to a boil, simmer for an hour, and add brandy, brown sugar and orange juice.

similar.name: The Oxford Bishop: 19th Century Spiced Mulled Port Wine

name: St. Croix Mango Rum Punch
directions: Mix the juices and nectars in a pitcher.
Stir in enough grenadine to make it a pretty salmon pink color.
Add two spoonfuls of the maraschino cherry juice and a few cherries.
Add the liquor.
Stir it thoroughly!
Taste the punch to check the strength. You may want to add more alcohol to make it a little stronger. If you do, try to keep the proportions of the liquors the same.
Just a note: Nectar is sold in individual cans. It's usually either with the juices or in the "ethnic food" section with the Latino items. I've used both Kerns and Jumex and they're both good.

If you don't have mango rum, substitute another 1/2 shot of triple sec (to make a whole shot) and another 1/2 shot of light rum. However, I recommend looking for the mango--that's what makes this punch a little unique. Check the airplane bottles--they might have it there if there are no bigger bottles.  Both Cruzan and Captain Morgan make the flavor.

similar.name: Mango, Passion Fruit and Banana Punch

name: L.a. Infusion
directions: Combine infused syrup (recipe below) and champagne in a glass.
Adorn with a lightly sugared lemon slice, sprig of mint, or lightly toasted sugar rim.
Enjoy!
Infused syrup:
Combine ingredients (water, sugar,   lemongrass, ginger, and mint leaves) in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
Once ingredients reach boil, reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and strain through a fine sieve or cheesecloth.

similar.name: Sugar-Free Hot Peach Lemon Tea Mix

name: Peppermint Punch
directions: Chop the candy canes in a food processor to get them fine enough.  Place the softened ice cream and strawberry preserves in a punch bowl.  Mix well.
When serving, add the soda and sprinkle in the crushed candy canes on top and stir.
Unwrap the whole candy canes and hang on the sides of the punch bowl with the ends inside.

name: Kentucky Plantation Wedding Punch
directions: Combine tea, apple, and pineapple juices and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Add club soda, fruit slices, and mint immediately before serving.
Serve over ice.

name: Creamy Eggnog Punch
directions: Scoop softened, but not melted, ice cream into a punch bowl.
Pour eggnog over ice cream and mix slightly.
Sprinkle with nutmeg and cinnamon and mix.
Gently stir in whipped topping that has been thawed.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Sunshine Brunch Punch
directions: Refrigerate juice and ginger ale until very cold, perferrably over night.
Combine juice and soda in punch bowl.
Top with scoops of sherbet just before serving.

name: White House Eggnog
directions: Defrost ice cream.
Mix first 5 ingredients.
Add vanilla to taste.
Stir.
Store in closed container(s) in refrigerator.  Plastic milk jugs work well for this.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top of individual glasses of eggnog before serving.

name: Strawberry Pineapple Slush
directions: In large pot, bring water, sugar, and gelatin to boiling; stirring to dissolve sugar and gelatin.
Chill about 1 hour or until slightly thickened.
Stir in pineapple juice and lemon juice.
Divide mixture among 8 quart size resealable plastic freezer bags.  Seal bags and freeze until firm.
To serve, let bags of juice mixture stand at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Empty bags into large punch bowl.
Add ginger ale.
Break up mixture with spoon until it is a slushy consistency.
Serve immediately.

name: Hot Buttered Crandazzle
directions: Mix sugar, butter and spices together until creamy. Can be stored for up to 3 weeks in the refrigerator.
For each serving: Put one heaping tablespoon of butter mixture into clear heat-proo glass mug.
Add cinnamon stick, orange peel, and cranberries to cranberry juice and bring just to a boil (you can place this in a chafing dish and allow guest to fix their own).
Add 3/4 cup cranberry along with some of the orange peel, a cinnamon stick, and cranberries, to each glass. Add a jigger of rum. Stir to blend.

name: The Oxford Bishop: 19th Century Spiced Mulled Port Wine
directions: Pre-heat oven to 200C/400F/gas mark 6.
Cut the orange in half and stud the 2 halves with the cloves.
Place the two halves on a lined baking tray cut-side up, and bake for 15 - 20 minutes.
Take out of the oven & set to one side.
Meanwhile pour the water into a large pan and add the sugar, cinnamon, mace, allspice & ginger.
Place over a high heat and stirring all the time, bring to the boil and let it boil until it has reduced by about half.
Take off the heat & set to one side.
When you are ready to serve the Oxford Bishop, empty the bottle of port into the pan with the spiced sugar water and add the two halves of baked oranges.
Add the orange juice and gently heat up and simmer - be careful NOT to boil it!
Serve from a warmed Punch Bowl with the orange halves floating in it - this should serve about 6 people.

similar.name: Old English a Hot Mulled Cider

name: Deanna’s Southern Sipper Punch
directions: Dissolve the sugar in the water,.
then add the juices and the mashed
bananas.
Then you mix all together EXCEPT the soda.
Divide it into 6 equal portions into freezable containers.
Freeze ahead.  2 hours ahead, shave frozen mixture into a punch bowl.
One portion = 2 liter bottle.
Makes 72 punch cups…if you are a true southern belle…7 tumblers! Ha Ha!

name: Prohibition Punch
directions: Dissolve sugar in two cups of boiling water.
Add remaining water and fruit juices. Freeze.
Three hours before serving, put frozen mixture into punch bowl and add ginger ale. Punch will be slushy.

name: Hot Scarlet Wine Punch
directions: In a lrg saucepan, combine cranberry juice, brown sugar, cinnamon stick & cloves.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat & simmer uncovered for 5 minute Remove spices.
Add white zinfandel; heat till just warm.
Ladle into mugs or transfer to a warm, heatproof pitcher & pour into mugs.
NOTE: If you prefer a non-alcoholic version, sub 3 1/4 cups white grape juice for the white zinfandel & omit the brown sugar.

name: Sugar-Free Spiced Tea (Russian) Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients and store in an air-tight container.
To make a cup, add 1 1/2 teaspoons of the mix to 1 cup of hot water.
To give as a gift, package in 1 cup containers and attach the recipe and the nutritional information which is as follows (according to the website where I got this):
3 calories per 1 cup serving. 0 fat, 0 cholesterol and 1 milligram sodium to a cup.

name: Mocha Punch
directions: Brew and chill coffee.  (I have a 10-cup Mr. Coffee I just used one pot, I didn't measure out 7 Cups).
Whip the whipping cream until stiff.
Pour the chilled coffee in a punch bowl.
Add 1/2 the Ice Cream.
Mix until the Ice Cream is partly melted.
Add the Rum OR Almond extract, and salt.
Fold in the remainder of the ice cream and the whipped cream.
Serve in tall glasses and garnish with whipped cream sprinkled with nutmeg or chocolate.

name: Yet     Another Mulled  Cider Recipe
directions: Pour the cider into a crock pot, up to about 2 inches from the top.
Drop in cardamom, nutmeg, allspice, brown sugar, and cinnamon.
Chop the oranges each into 4 wedges longitudinally.
Stick 3 cloves into the skin side of each orange wedge.
Put the cleaved and cloven oranges into the crock pot.
If there's room, add more cider to within an inch of the top.
Stir with a ladle.
Cover the crock pot with a folded towel and crank it up to "high.".
Allow to boil for at least an hour, then remove the towel and set to "low.".
(Optional) Serve with a shot of spiced rum in each mug.

name: Sparkling Pomegranate Punch
directions: In a punch bowl, combine pomegranate juice, orange juice, and limeade.
Pour in the champagne; float lime and orange slices on top.
Ladle into 12 ice-filled glasses, sprinkle with pomegranate seeds and serve.

name: White Grape, Tangerine, and Asti Spumante Punch
directions: In a punch bowl whisk together the grape juice, tangerine concentrate, club soda, lemon juice, and brandy and chill the mixture, covered, until it is cold.
Add the Asti-Spumante slowly just before serving and serve in punch glasses, garnished with the tangerine slices.

name: Rum and Ginger Beer Punch
directions: Combine the rum, lime juice, cordial and mint in a large serving jug.
Add the ginger beer and lemon and lime slices; stir to combine.
Add the ice.
Pour into glasses to serve.

name: Iced Tea Frapee
directions: Steep tea bags in boiling water.
Let cool.
Add mango nectar.
Add fresh lime juice.
Mix well; remove tea bags.
Pour into ice cube tray, place in freezer.
When frozen remove cubes and put into blender or ice crusher.
Puree until slushy consistency; pour into large glass with straw--enjoy.

name: Run for the Roses Punch Mix
directions: In a 3-qt container, combine 1st 5 ingredients & tint to a pale green color using green liquid food coloring.
Pour evenly into 1.5 qt or 1.5 lt bottles or containers w/secure caps. Cover & store in refrigerator. Give prep instructions w/ea container as follows:
To Make Punch: In a lrg punch bowl, stir together 1.5 qts chilled punch mix & 12 oz chilled lemon-lime soft drink. If desired, add ice cubes & garnish w/fresh mint.

Serving Tips: If serving over ice & as mentioned in a prior recipe, freeze lemon-lime soft drink in cubes & place a sprig of mint in ea cube. Another option would be to garnish w/a candied lime slice using my Recipe #190440. Imagine the presentation!

name: Mojito Punch
directions: Start by boiling the water and sugar.
Stir constantly until dissolved.
Take off heat.
Add washed and clean mint.
Leave mint in for 15 minutes.
Strain mint and refrigerate liquid.
Hour before party.
Use punch bowl.
Add ice (see above).
Combine rum, lime juice, water and syrup in bowl.
Serve in glasses garnished with mint sprig and lime wedge.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: In a 3 quart heatproof pitcher, stir together sugar, gelatin and boiling water.
Continue stirring until sugar and gelatin are dissolved.
Add cold water and lemon juice.
Refrigerate to chill, serve over ice.
Garnish with lemon slices.

name: Cinnamon Apple Cider
directions: Combine the apple cider, cranberry juice, brown sugar, butter, cinnamon sticks and cloves in a large pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low so the cider is gently simmering and add the vanilla extract.
Simmer for 45 minutes to blend the flavors and serve.

name: Another Percolator Punch Recipe
directions: Pour Apple Cider and Ginger Ale in bottom of 30-cup percolator.
Place Red-Hots, cloves, and cinnamon sticks.
in percolator basket.
Let perk.
Makes 30 cups Hot punch.

name: Witches Brew (Adult Version)
directions: Mix well.
Pour into your cauldron, preferably with chunks of dry ice to create the bubbling steam effect.

name: Tropical Punch in the Face
directions: Fill 20 oz shaker half full of ice.
Add frozen fruit.
Add sugar, citrus, and alcohol.
Shake vigorously for 5 minutes.
Rest five minutes.
Shake vigorously 2 more minutes.
Enjoy.

name: Hot Grape Punch
directions: Heat the grape juice in a saucepan.
Add the sugar and simmer until dissolved.
Stir in the lemon juice and cloves.
Simmer two minutes longer.
Add the apple.
Pour into four glasses.
Garnish with slices of lemon.

name: Make Believe Champagne
directions: In a large pitcher combine the carbonated water, ginger ale and grape juice.
Pour over ice cubes.
Serve in champagne or wine glasses.

name: Frothy Cappuccino Punch
directions: Pour coffee into large punch bowl.
Combine 2 1/4 cups evaporated milk, 1/2 cup sugar and vanilla extract in blender; blend until frothy.
Add milk mixture to coffee.
Repeat with remaining evaporated milk and remaining sugar.
Add scoops of ice cream to punch and top with chocolate curls.
Ladle punch into cups; sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Cape Codder Punch
directions: Stir together first 3 ingredients.
Stir in ginger ale just before serving.
Serve over ice.
Garnish with fresh cranberries and lime wedges on swizzle sticks.

similar.name: Farmhouse Poinsettia Punch for the Holidays

name: Classic Eggnog
directions: Gradually add sugar to eggs in a large glass mixing bowl, whisking until blended. Set aside.
Stir together half and half, milk, and salt in a Dutch oven over medium-low heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, 12-15 minutes or just until mixture begins to bubble around edges of pan (do not boil).
Gradually stir half of hot milk mixture into egg mixture. Stir egg mixture into remaining hot milk mixture in Dutch oven.

Cook mixture over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture slightly thickens and thermometer registers 160 degrees (about 30 minutes). Remove from heat and stir one minute. Pour mixture through a fine wire-mesh strainer into a serving bowl. Stir inn bourbon, brandy, and vanilla; let cool 1 hour. Cover and chill at least 4 hours.
Beat whipping cream at high speed with an electric mixer unti soft peaks form. Fold whipped cream into chilled eggnog, and sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Warm Raspberry Cider for the Holidays
directions: Combine everything in a large pan or crock-pot.
Heat to a simmer, then turn down and keep warm until closer to serving time.
May be served hot, warm or even cooled completely with equally tasty results.
NOTE:  Instead of apple-raspberry, try apple-cranberry, with a pitcher of reconstituted apple juice (instead of the cider).

name: Linda's Punch
directions: Pour juices into punch bowl.
Scoop sherbet into juice.
Add gingerale last.

name: Raspberry Mint Cairo Cooler
directions: Rub the mint leaves around the inside of a large iced tea jug or pitcher, then drop them into the glass.
Pour in remaining ingredients and mix well.
Serve with a lime wedge on the edge of the glass.
Our troop leader Nashawn, also made this recipe using mint and raspberry extract to taste, and it got rave reviews.
For an alcohol variation, add 1-2 shots (30-60ml) of dark rum to 16 ounces of cooler. (No, The Girl scouts did not partake of this version!).

name: Autumn Punch
directions: Put cloves and vanilla bean in cheesecloth and tie in a bundle with string.
Pour apple-cranberry juice into a large container/pitcher. Add the plums and spice bag.
Cover and chill for 4-24 hours.
Remove spice bag. Stir in wine or ginger ale. Serve over ice with plum slices or heat the punch and serve.

similar.name: Farmhouse Poinsettia Punch for the Holidays

name: Apricot Citrus Drink
directions: In a 2 quart pitcher mix the nectar & the juices, blending well. If sugar is to be added, add it now, then stir, mixing well.
Chill well before pouring into 4 glasses.

name: Orange Lemon Grapefruit Honey Punch
directions: Combine all the ingredients & blend thoroughly.
Chill & serve.

similar.name: White Grape, Tangerine, and Asti Spumante Punch

name: Homemade Welsh Ginger Beer
directions: Firstly, make the yeast 'plant' or starter: mix the yeast with the warm water, add 2 teaspoons ground ginger and 2 teaspoons sugar. Stir well. Make that mix in an opaque jar or jug, or keep it in the dark for 24 hours.
Feed this starter with 1 teaspoon ground ginger and one teaspoon of sugar every day for the next six days.  In total, you will use 8 teaspoons of ginger and 8 teaspoons of sugar for the starter.
After the full week it took to make this, strain this starter through a cheesecloth, or use a fine sieve.
Dissolve the 1 1/2 lbs of sugar with 2 pints of water.
Juice the 2 lemons, and add the juice to the sugar water.
Add the sugar water with lemon juice to the strained starter.
Add the resulting mix to the 5 pints of water.
Mix well.
Bottle in sterilized bottles or screw-topped jars.
Keep for seven days to mature, then it's ready.

similar.name: New Ginger Wine - Christmas & Holiday Ginger Wine

name: Spiced Wassail
directions: Break the cinnamon stick into pieces, &--along with the whole cloves & whole allspice--tie the cinnamon pieces in a cheesecloth bag.
Cut each orange in half.
In a large covered saucepan, combine the cider, cranberry juice, sugar & orange bitters.
Add the spice bag, oranges & rum extract, & simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Remove spices & pour into a warm serving bowl, leaving the oranges to float on top.

name: Swampwater ( Spirits )
directions: To each 1-1/2 ounces of Green Chartreuse, add 6 ounces pineapple juice, 1/4 teaspoon lime, and ice.
Stir.
Note: one bottle of Green Chartreuse makes one gallon of Swampwater.
Careful this is a very potent drink.

similar.name: Green Swamp Punch with Frightful Frozen Hand

name: X-Rated Pink Lemonade
directions: Combine all ingredients in a highball filled with ice.
Garnish with lemon wedge.
Enjoy! ;).

name: Fran's Pine-Lime Punch
directions: Combine all juices in a punch bowl or halved and scooped out watermelon.
Just before serving add scoops of sherbet.
Pour ginger ale over sherbet.

similar.name: Bud Light Lime and Vodka Punch

name: Blood Orange Lemonade
directions: In a pitcher, blend water and sugar until the sugar dissolves.
Add orange blossom water, blood orange juice and lemon juice.  Stir.
Add what remains of one lemon and one blood orange.
Let chill for 30 minutes.
Serve over ice.

name: Parrot Head Punch
directions: Mix together well.
Serve over ice in your favorite tiki glass.
Garnish with pineapple wedge and umbrella.

name: Spiced Lemon Apple Cider
directions: Combine all ingredients together in a large pot and cook over medium heat for 20 minutes.
Serve Warm! I put mine in a crockpot to keep it warm.
Enjoy!

name: Happy Holiday Cider
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degree F.
Insert about half the cloves into 2 baking apples.
Place the apples in a 2-quart square baking dish.
Add the water.
Bake apples, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
Add crab apples, if desired.
Bake an additional 25 to 30 minutes or until apples and crab apples are tender; cool slightly.
Halve or quarter baking apples.
Set aside.
Meanwhile, squeeze juice from oranges and lemons (you should have 1-1/3 cups orange juice and 3/4 cup lemon juice).
In a 4-quart Dutch oven combine orange and lemon juices, apple cider, sugar, cinnamon, remaining cloves, allspice, and nutmeg. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
Simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes.
Use a slotted spoon to remove whole cloves and stick cinnamon from cider mixture.
To serve, place apples in a large heat-proof punch bowl; carefully pour cider mixture into bowl.

name: Stacyia's Fuzzy Navel
directions: In a high ball glass or collins glass fill half way with ice.
Then add a 1/2 cup of peach schnapps.
Now add another 1/2 cup of Minute Maid Orange Juice.
A little dash of Sprite.
Squeeze your lime wedge a little into the drink and drop it into your glass.
Fill the rest of the glass with Grey Goose or Skyy vodka (your choice of Vodka if you even want it).
Stir.
Now drop in your cherries.

name: Spiced Pineapple Punch
directions: Pour the pineapple juice, condensed milk, vanilla, nutmeg and cinnamon into a blender.
Blend for a few seconds until well blended.
Chill the punch until very cold.
Pour over ice and top with a squeeze of lime juice.
I have been known to sneak a shot of Coconut Rum into the glass ;).

name: Kid's Pretend Tea
directions: Dissolve the jello in the water.
Add the apple juice.
Serve hot.
NOTE:  When you refrigerate it after serving, it might gel some, but when you heat it up again, it will be fine.

name: Caterer's Slushy Punch
directions: Combine sugar with the 3 cups water; heat until sugar is dissolved.
Dissolve gelatin in 2 cups boiling water; cool.
Mix all ingredients EXCEPT the ginger ale or lemon lime and freeze in a large plastic container for at least 24 hours.
About 1 hour before serving, turn frozen mixture into a large punch bowl and add the soda.
To create a slushy texture, poke the frozen punch with an ice pick or large fork.

name: Emerald Isle Punch
directions: Mix all together well in a large punch bowl, and chill well.

similar.name: Bud Light Lime and Vodka Punch

name: Spodie Odie!
directions: Go out and buy a brand new plastic garbage receptacle.
Bring it home and wash it well.
On day of your Spodie Odie, just as your guests arrive,  put in the block of ice, and add club soda.
Have mayo jars or glasses ready.
As guests arrive, have them pour their chosen wine, chop or slice and add their favorite fruit.
Add a ladle, spread blankets on the lawn, turn on the tunes, and invite your neighbors so you don't keep them up!

name: Fruit Punch
directions: Combine the orange juice, lemonade, and pineapple juice and stir well.
Bring 3 cups water and the sugar to a boil in a heavy saucepan and boil until sugar is dissolved, about 5 minutes. Let cool.
Add the syrup to the fruit juices.
Place the whole strawberries into a ring mold.
Pour in enough fruit juice to fill the mold. Freeze.
Refrigerate the remaining juice.
When ready to serve, pour the fruit juice into a punch bowl and add the soda.
Float the strawberry ice ring in the punch.

name: Sparkling Orange Punch
directions: Mix the triple sec and orange juice together in a punch bowl.
Top with the sparkling wine and float tangerine sections on top just before serving.

name: Waikiki Champagne Punch
directions: Combine the pineapple juice, champagne, wine and pineapple chunks in a large punch bowl.
Add ice cubes as needed.
Decorate the punch with the strawberries, orange slices and lemon slices.
Add additional ice as needed.

name: Hurricane Punch - Non Alcoholic
directions: Combine all ingredients except ginger ale, and chill.
Add ginger ale right before serving.
Float slices of fruit.

name: Kiwi Lemonade Spritzer
directions: Cut kiwi into chunks.
Process fruit chunks and lemonade concentrate in food processor until smooth.
Pour mixture through wire mesh strainer into a pitcher discarding solids.
Stir in lemon lime drink just before serving.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Iced Rhubarb Tea
directions: In a large heavy saucepan combine the water and the rhubarb.
Bring to a boil and then let simmer until tender about 20 minutes.
Strain, and add the juice of one lemon and the sugar (more or less, to taste).
Cool well, and serve over ice in tall glasses.

name: Lychee Mint Champagne
directions: Puree the lychees and mint leaves in a food processor.
Strain through a fine sieve into a bowl.
Half fill a glass with the mixture and top with champagne.
Garnish with mint.

name: Horchata (Iced Cinnamon Milk Punch)
directions: Combine rice and cinnamon stick pieces in large bowl.
Stir in 12 cups of water. Let stand (room temperature) 6-8 hours.
Without disturbing rice on bottom, pour most of the water into another contaciner; reserve.
Remove cinnamon from rice mixture and reserve.
Add milk, condensed milk, sugar and vanilla to rice. Stir to mix.
Process in blender or food processor, working in batches, until as smooth as possible.
Stir mixture into reserved water. Return cinnamon pieces to mixture & chill.
Remove cinnamon sticks. Shake vigorously and serve in tall ice-filled glasses.
Garnish each glass with ground cinnamon.

name: Mint Limeade
directions: Combine 2 cups water, sugar, and chopped mint in a small saucepan; bring to a boil.
Cook until sugar dissolves, stirring frequently. Remove from heat, let stand 10 minutes.
Strain through a sieve into a bowl; discard solids.
Combine the remaining 4 cups water, sugar syrup, and lime juice in a large pitcher, stirring well.
Serve over ice, garnish with mint sprigs and lime slices, if desired.

name: Cracker (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add the juices and top with soda. Stir.
Garnish with a slice of lime. Serve with a straw and a stirrer.

name: Cantaloupe Liquado
directions: Place the melon pieces into your blender (until about half full) and then squeeze the lime juice into the blender. Use a pulse setting to blend and add water in 1/4 cup increments until it starts to move.
Once the fruit has turned to pulp, add more fruit if you have it. Leave the blender on for 2-3 minutes.

Use a spoon to determine how smooth it is. If you wish it to be smoother, keep blending for up to 4 more minutes and taste to determine if it is sweet enough. If you're not sure, add a little salt, blend it for 30 seconds and taste again.
If it still isn't sweet enough, add sugar and blend again for a minute. Once it tastes the way you want, you're ready to get it to have the texture that you want.
Pour the pulp mixture into a serving pitcher. Add cold water a cup at a time and stir vigorously until reaching your desired thickness.
If you want a smoother drink, put a colander over a large bowl or pan. Line it with two layers of cheesecloth and slowly pour your drink through it to catch any fibers.
Any unused pieces of melon can be taken as melon balls, frozen, and then put into the drinks as a sort of "ice cube" making a great treat in the drink as well.

name: Wassail (Crock Pot)
directions: Mix all ingredients in crock pot.
Simmer at least 30 minutes.
Serves 12.

similar.name: Wassail Hot Beverage Crock Pot Recipe!

name: Hole-In-The-Rock Punch
directions: In an oversized container, mix first four ingredients.  The drink will appear brown.
Add carbonated soda, if desired.

name: Sugar-Free Hot Peach Lemon Tea Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients and store in a jar.
To prepare 2 quarts of tea, mix 2 level tablespoons of mix with 2 quarts of boiling water and stir to dissolve mix.

name: Whiskey Punch
directions: Combine ingredients.
Add 2 cups of ice cubes.
Decorate with lemon and orange slices.

name: Mango Pomegranate Punch
directions: Just pour everything into a large punch bowl, stir and serve in punch glasses.
You can also make individual drinks using the same ingredients as follows:
Pint glass filled with ice, 1 1/2 oz Mango Vodka, 1 oz Mango Nectar, 1 oz Pomegranate juice, 1/2 oz cherry juice, 1 oz 7-up and a  splash lime juice. Stir and serve with a lime wedge garnish.

name: Green Bottom Punch
directions: Mix and Serve in limited quantities!

name: Ginger-Cucumber Limeade
directions: In a blender container combine 1 1/2 cups cucumber, limeade concentrate and ginger. Cover and blend until nearly smooth.
In 1-quart pitcher gently stir together cucumber mixture and club soda.
Serve immediately over ice cubes. Garnish with cucumber slices, if desired.

name: Auntie's Milk Punch
directions: Put ice in shaker with remaining ingredients.  Shake until foamy and completely chilled.  Serve immediately.

name: White Sangria With Fresh Strawberries, Mango and Mint
directions: Crush mint to bring out its flavor.
Combine all ingredients in large pitcher and serve.

name: Get Your Groove on Punch
directions: Combine juices, rum, and coco Lopez.  Stir in seltzer.

name: Deutsch Mai Bowle (Strawberries in May Wine Bowl) a German Tradi
directions: Place dried herbs in small bowl; add boiling water. Let stand 1 hour; strain. Place 3 tablespoons in punch bowl. Stir in sugar, cognac, and wine; add ice.
Just before serving, pour in champagne or soda and float strawberries in the bowl.

similar.name: May Wine Punch With Sweet Woodruff (Mai Bowle)

name: Rio-Style Ginger Beer Floats
directions: Scoop 1/2 cup mango sorbet into each of 4 tall glasses.
Add 1/2 cup of orange juice to each glass.
Pour half a bottle of ginger beer into each glass.
Scoop the seeds from the passion fruits on top and serve immediately with long straws.

name: Pineapple Ginger Beer Floats
directions: Scoop 1/2 cup of pineapple sorbet into each of 4 tall glasses.
Add 1/2 cup of pineapple juice to each glass.
Pour 1/2 bottle of ginger beer into each glass.
Top each drink with 1/4 can of crushed pineapple.
Serve immediately with long straws.

name: Govenor’s Mansion Summer Peach Punch
directions: To make simple syrup—bring 2 cups water and 1 cup water to a boil; boil, stirring occasionally until sugar is dissolved; cool to room temperature (you will use ½ cup of this mixture).
To make punch: bring 4 cups water to a boil in a saucepan; add tea bags and mint leaves.
Boil 1 minute; remove from heat; cover and steep 10 minutes.
Remove and discard tea bags and mint.
Pour into a 1 gallon container; add peach nectar, lemonade concentrate, and simple syrup; stir to combine.
Cover and chill 8 hours or overnight.
Pour chilled tea mixture into a punch bowl; stir in ginger ale and club soda just before serving; garnish with fresh mint sprigs.

similar.name: Governor's Mansion Summer Peach Tea Punch

name: Agua De Valencia - Knock Your Socks off Spanish Cava Punch!
directions: Put some ice cubes into a large jug and pour over lots of orange juice. Now add the bottle of cava.
Once the fizz subsides, stir in a good dash of the cointreau and it´s ready to serve.
Makes about 2 pints.

name: Aunt Georgie's Real Christmas Punch
directions: Simmer lemon, cloves, cinnamon sticks, water and 2 cups of cranberry juice for 1/2 hour.
In a humongous bowl add 2 liters of cranberry juice, ginger ale, and pineapple juice.
Mix cooked contents into bowl with juices with ice. Mmm mmm good.

name: Apple Party Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients and freeze for 6-8 hours.
Remove half an hour before serving, breaking the 'ice' into chunks.
Continue to stir until slushy and serve.

name: Frosty Orange Cooler (Or Punch)
directions: In 2-3 quart pitcher, combine water, orange juice con., lemon juice con., and sugar.
Stir til sugar dissolves.
Chill.
Just before serving, add ginger ale.
Scoop sherbet into glasses, pour in juice mixture.
Garnish the edge of the glass with another scoop of sherbet, and an orange slice.
Garnish top with a sprig of fresh mint leaves.
Serve immediately.
Makes 2 quarts.
*Champagne can be substituted for the ginger ale, too! ;).

similar.name: Decorative Ice Cubes or Ice Mold

name: Strawberry Coolers
directions: Combine pineapple juice, strawberries and sugar in a blender; blend until the berries are pureed.
Place the berry puree in a large pitcher.
Add ginger ale; stir to combine. Serve over ice.
Garnish with a sprig of mint.

name: Black Currant & Vanilla Punch
directions: Bring apple juice to the boil, remove from heat & put tea bags into the liquid. Allow to cool.
When cold take out tea bags, add mineral water.
A presentation tip is to serve scattered with pink rose petals.

name: Old Fashioned Lemon (Citrus) Barley Water
directions: Rinse the barley well.
Cover barley in a pot with cold water & bring to the boil, drain.
Return barley to saucepan with the lemon rind & 10 cups water, cook slowly for 1 hour.
Add the lemon juice & sugar and stir until sugar has dissolved.
Strain and chill to serve.
Discarded barley can be mixed with some dried fruit & nuts and warm milk and makes a great breakfast.

name: Tea Slush
directions: Steep 4 tea bags in 2 cups boiling water for 10 minutes and cool.
Mix 2 cups sugar in 7 cups of water in a sauce pan and boil til clear.
Add 12 oz frozen lemonade and 12 oz frozen orange juice.
Mix together in a  4 quart plastic bowl with lid and add 2 cups of vodka.
Freeze (over night).
Keeps indefinitely.

name: Fruity Punch
directions: In a pitcher combine juices.
Add sprigs of mint and chill.
To serve, remove mint and pour juice over crushed ice.
Add apples and serve immediately.

name: Fruit Cup
directions: In a large pitcher combine all ingredients except ginger ale in a large pitcher.
To serve, pour juice mixture over ice in a large punch bowl.
Add ginger ale.
Stir gently and serve right away.

name: Old English a Hot Mulled Cider
directions: Mix the cider, juices, lemons, and oranges in a large saucepan or Dutch oven.
Tie ginger and spices in a cheesecloth bag; add to saucepan.
Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
Simmer, uncovered, 15 minute
Remove spice bag.
Stir in brandy.
Serve warm in chafing dish or heat-proof punch bowl.
Serves 36 (1/2 cup each).

similar.name: The Oxford Bishop: 19th Century Spiced Mulled Port Wine

name: Blue Lemonade
directions: Heat 2 cups of water with sugar, until sugar dissolves.
Continue to heat for 5 minutes or so until it starts to thicken up.
Add the rest of the water, zest and juice.
Let cool to room temperature.
Put the blueberries in a blender and puree.
Stir berries into the lemonade and let sit for 2 hours at room temperature.
Strain lemonade and chill before serving.

name: Second Serve Sangria Punch
directions: Separate fruit from Sangria.
Put fruit through a juice extractor.
Add extracted juice and Sangria to a pitcher along with the liter of soda.  Mix well and serve over ice.

name: Cairns Cooler (Mocktail)
directions: Pour ingredients one after the other into a serving glass filled with ice.

similar.name: Frothy Blue Punch (Baby Shower/Young Boy's Party)

name: Spiked Pink Lemonade
directions: Mix it up in a punch bowl and serve!

name: Ginger Margaritas
directions: Mix up in a punch bowl and serve!

name: Orange Sparklers
directions: Mix up and serve from a punch bowl.

name: The Blizzard (Connecticut)
directions: Stir all ingredients together.
Color with grenadine if desired.
Serve over ice in tall, frosted glasses.

name: Bleeding Hearts Punch
directions: Cut a V shape under stem of each strawberry and discard. Cut berries in half lengthwise across the V to form a heart.
Lay berries in a single layer on baking sheets. Freeze until solid, at least 1 hour; flex pan to release frozen fruit.
In a 4 1/2-quart or larger bowl, mix cranberry juice cocktail concentrate with sparkling water. Add frozen berries.

name: Cape Codder Punch
directions: Stir together first 3 ingredients.
Stir in ginger ale just before serving. Serve over ice. Garnish, if desired.

name: Caribbean Rum or No Rum Zing
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the orange juice with the guava nectar and rum. Add the ice and stir until cold; add the ginger ale.
Pour into cocktail glasses, add the grenadine and nutmeg, and serve.

name: Rose Water Soda
directions: Combine water and sugar in a medium saucepan.
Stir over low heat for 3-4 minutes until sugar dissolves.
Bring to the boil, then simmer for 5 minutes.
Cool to room temperature, then chill until cold.
In a large jug, combine the sugar syrup with the rosewater, lime slices and mint.
Add the soda water and a few drops of food colouring.
Add ice cubes and stir.

name: Mango Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients except the garnish, in a blender and blend at high speed for 5 seconds.
Pour into wine glasses, garnish and serve.

similar.name: Mango, Passion Fruit and Banana Punch

name: Berry Soda
directions: Chop the berries finely; mix with sugar.
Purée in blender after 2 hours.
Fill half glass with purée add crushed ice; top with soda stirring with a spoon continuously to make a froth.
Garnish with mint leaves.

similar.name: Peppermint, Ginger & Soda Drink With Berry Ice Cubes

name: Lime Tea Punch
directions: Pour boiling water over tea bags and leave to stand for 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags and add strained lime juice; cool.
Combine sugar and extra water in pan, stir over low heat without boiling until sugar is dissolved, then boil without stirring for 3 minutes. Cool.
Add sugar syrup to lime and tea mixture and chill again.
Add chilled lemonade just before serving and decorate with slices of lime and fresh mint.

name: Virgin Pomegranate Sangria
directions: Mix juices and sugar until sugar dissolves.
Wash orange and berries and slice into thin slices. Remove mango or papaya skin and cut fruit into chunks. Remove kiwi skin and cut into thick slices.
Place all fruit into juice and let flavors meld in fridge for 2-3 hours or overnight before serving.
Serve garnished with fruit slices.

similar.name: Mango, Passion Fruit and Banana Punch

name: Cranrazz Lemonaide
directions: Add first three ingredients together.
Stir until mixed well.
Add frozen rasperries.

name: Exciting Mango Drink
directions: Dice one whole mango.
Add a few cubes of ice.
Add the Torani Sugar Free Coconut Syrup.
Voila, you have a wonderful drink!

similar.name: Mango, Passion Fruit and Banana Punch

name: Frothy Vanilla Butterbeer
directions: Heat milk in a small saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the rest of the ingredients. Blend with a small handmixer if you have one, to make it frothy.
Bring the mixture almost to boiling, but not quite.
Pour into mugs and serve!

name: Lemonade
directions: Add powdered sugar in a glass pour 2 tbsp water and stir well to make sure sugar is well mixed.
Add lemon juice, black salt and cumin powder.
Add chilled water and top it with ice.
Enjoy.

name: Coconut Lemonade
directions: In large bowl combine water, lemon juice, sugar and coconut syrup. Stir until sugar is completely dissolved.
Cover and refrigerate 4 to 24 hours.
To serve, transfer to pitcher, add berries and star fruit slices. Serve over ice cubes.

name: Orange-Berry Sparkler
directions: NOTE: You may want to make this using only 1 cup of Splenda first.  Taste it, then add the rest if you need it.
Place Splenda and soft drink mixes in large plastic or glass pitcher.
Add water and stir until drink mixes are dissolved.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Stir in ginger ale.
Serve over ice cubes in 16 tall glasses.
Garnish each glass with a fresh orange slice just before serving.

name: Lemon Grape Coolers
directions: In a large pitcher filled with ice, pour in the grape juice, lemon juice and lemon-lime soda.
Stir gently.  Pour into glasses.
Garnish with sliced grapes and lemons. Enjoy!

name: Martimmy -- Official Drink of the Soap Opera Passions
directions: Combine liquid ingredients together, mix well. Serve chilled with a slice of orange.

*****Personal note:  Sadly, Joshua Ryan Evans who played Timmy passed away on August 5, 2002.  In a strange twist of art imitating life, the character Timmy was to give the character Charity a heart transplant.  Joshua died on the same day the episode aired due to complications with his heart during routine testing.  Joshua suffered from achondroplasia, a genetic condition that restricts cartilage growth and physical development.  He was only 3'2" tall although he was already 17 years old when he started on the show, hence his role as a doll.  All said of him that what he lacked in stature he made up for in heart.  He was 20 years old.  Other film credits included "Ally McBeal", "7th Heaven", "Baby Geniuses" and "How the Grinch Stole Christmas." *****.

name: Love Boat
directions: Blend all the ingredients together until smooth.
Serve in pineapple shell.

name: Foamy Sherbet Punch
directions: Place 3 trays crushed ice, 2 cups sugar, and lemon or lime juice in a large punch bowl and let set for 2-3 hours.
Fill punch bowl with ginger-ale, 7-up and Kool-Aid mix.
Add sherbet.
NOTE:
If you have a small punchbowl, use only half the ginger-ale, 7-up and sherbet, adding more as needed.

similar.name: Frothy Blue Punch (Baby Shower/Young Boy's Party)

name: Carnival Punch Cocktail
directions: Place all the ingredients, in a cocktail shaker, with ice, shake well and strain into a sling glass.
Top up with ginger beer and garnish with a pineapple leaf to serve.

name: Vanilla Sparkler
directions: Mix lemon juice with water and sugar; mix well.
Add vanilla and mix well.
Add sparkling water slowly.
Gently stir.
Serve over ice or chill. Enjoy!

name: Hummingbird Nectar Feeding Solution
directions: Bring 4 1/2 cups of filtered water to a boil for 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and measure water to be sure you have 4 cups.
Add sugar and allow sugar to dissolve.
Place in refrigerator until cooled.
Fill hummingbird feeders and enjoy.
Store remaining nectar in the refrigerator for up to one week.

name: Wassail - C T's Researched Version
directions: Using 2-3 lemons, squeeze juice for 1 cup, and remove rind (about 1/4 cup).  Slice remaining lemon and add it to the spices.
Wrap cinnamon sticks, lemon rind, nutmeg and allspice in cooking gauze.  Tie if dropping into the liquid; place carefully in percolator bin if using a percolator.
Pour apple cider, lemon juice, pineapple juice and honey into a large pot or the pot of a large percolator.
If using a large pot, add spice bag, and heat to a simmer.  Cook 45 minutes, then remove bag.
If using a large percolator, turn it on and let it heat for 45 minutes.
Add the ginger ale (Vernor's, if you can find it), just before serving.
If using a pot, use a long ladle to serve into heat-proof cups.  If using a percolator, you can use the spigot.

name: Relief Society Pineapple Slush
directions: Bring sugar and water to a boil; cool.  Add other ingredients.
Pour into a good size narrow pan or plastic dish.  Cover with tin foil or lid and freeze for several days.
When ready to serve, break into pieces.  Put in a punch bowl or in glasses and pour 7Up over the top and mix up.

name: Strawberry Banana Pineapple Sherbet Punch
directions: Thaw berries if using frozen.
Soften sherbet (not too runny).
Stir fruit into sherbet and serve in glasses.

name: Coquito (Puertorican Rum Eggnog)
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender.
Refrigerate for about an hour before serving. Serve very cold.

similar.name: Coquito - Traditional Recipe (Made With Egg Yolks)
Coquito from Puerto Rico Via Myrtle Beach, Sc

name: Red Reindeer Drink
directions: Get a clear glass.
Fill glass 1/3 full with cranberry juice.
Add one scoop vanilla ice cream.
Fill remainder of glass with 7Up.

name: Limeade Slush
directions: Combine water, sugar, and limeade until sugar is dissolved.
Cover and freezer.
Chop up and pour pop over.
Garnish with lime slices.

name: Relief Society Spiced Apple Cider
directions: Add whole cloves, allspice, and nutmeg to a spice bag or tie in cheese cloth.  Add to cider.
Stir in salt, cinnamon sticks, and brown sugar.
Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 hour or put in large crock pot and let simmer most of the day.

name: Butterbeer
directions: Microwave butter and topping in a 2 cup glass on high 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, till syrup is bubbly and butter is melted.
Stir and cool 30 seconds.
Slowly mix in soda (mixture will fizz quite a bit).
Serve in 2 coffee mugs or small glasses.

name: Champagne Cup
directions: Sweeten fruit juices slightly; combine the remaining ingredients.
Pour into a punch bowl and let stand for ten minutes with the ice ring before serving.

name: Het Pint (Spirits)
directions: Put ale into a thick saucepan
Add nutmeg, bring to just below boiling-point. Do not boil! *
Stir in sugar, let it dissolve.
Beat eggs very well, add gradually to beer, stir all the time to avoid curdling.
Add whisky, heat up. Do not boil! *
Pour liquid from saucepan into heated tankards, back and forth.
Serve when pouring drink back and forth enough makes it clear and sparkling.
Het pint can also be made with white wine and brandy instead of ale and whisky.
* If you boil liquor, the alcohol vaporizes into thin air -- .

similar.name: George Washington's Eggnog [ I'm Not Kidding!]

name: Raspberry Mint Crush
directions: Combine boiling water, sugar, and mint leaves; let stand 5 minutes.
Add raspberries and lemonade concentrate; stir till thawed.
Add 2 cups cold water and stir.  Serve over ice.

name: Frozen Banana Punch
directions: Combine fruit juice and lemonade in a 1.5-gallon container.
In small batches in a blender, puree the bananas with water and sugar. Add the banana mash to the fruit juices. I use a stick blender to make sure that all ingredients are well-blended.
Freeze the base in 5 1-quart containers.
The day of service, thaw the punch base until it is slushy.
Add two liters of mixer for every quart of punch base.
Serving suggestion: Punch cups may be garnished with skewered fruit.
I think 2 cups of sugar is enough. Add more to adjust to your own taste.

name: Peaches 'n' Cream Cooler
directions: In a blender, combine the first nine ingredients; cover and process until smooth.
Add sparkling water; cover and process until blended.
Pour into glasses; serve immediately.

name: Pink Lemonade Wine Spritzers
directions: In a large pitcher combine all ingredients and stir.  Refrigerate 1 hour to combine flavors.  Serve chilled.

name: Spiced Pomegranate Punch
directions: Cut pomegranates in half.  Extract juice from seeds with a citrus juicer.  Strain into a medium saucepan.
Add cider, water, cinnamon and ginger.  Cook over high heat until simmering, 5 to 6 minutes.  Reduce heat; simmer gently for 15 minutes.  Skim any foam that rises to the surface.
Remove from heat.  Discard cinnamon and ginger.  Stir in orange juice.  Serve warm.

name: Bangladeshi  Yogurt  Juice !
directions: Take a jar and with the help of a spoon mix yogurt with sugar.
Don't mix with the mixer or blender.
Now mix yogurt and sugar mixture with 7 Up or Sprite or milk.
If you don't want to use 7 Up or Sprite, you can use 3 1/2 cup milk; or if you don't want to use milk, you can use 3 1/2 cups 7 Up or Sprite.
Now take the juice in glasses filled half with chopped ice and serve -- .

similar.name: P.O.G. Passion Fruit, Orange & Guava Juice.

name: Famous Dave's Watermelon Punch
directions: Cut the top 1/3 off the watermelon.
Hollow out the shell, saving the watermelon fruit.
Put the shell in the fridge to chill.
Using a blender, puree the watermelon in batches.
Strain through a small strainer until you have 8 cups watermelon juice.
Add the concentrates, lime juice, and grenadine.
Chill this mixture until serving time.
When ready to serve, add the sprite to the watermelon juice mixture.
Pour into hollowed out watermelon shell, add scoops of rainbow sherbet and serve.

name: Coqui
directions: Combine coconut cream, evaporated milk, egg yolks, and vanilla in blender; blend at HIGH speed for 30 secs, or until mixture is smooth.
Add both rums & cointreau; blend for few secs longer.
Refrigerate for 4 hours or until thoroughly chilled.
TO SERVE:
Pour into chilled parfait glasses & sprinkle top with grated nutmeg if desired.

similar.name: Coquito from Puerto Rico Via Myrtle Beach, Sc
Coquito - Traditional Recipe (Made With Egg Yolks)
Caribbean Rum or No Rum Zing

name: Mango, Passion Fruit and Banana Punch
directions: Peel ripe mangoes and remove flesh from flat, oval seeds with a sharp knife.
Cut flesh into cubes and transfer to a blender.
Add passion-fruit purée or nectar, bananas and rum to blender and blend to a chunky purée, about 30 seconds.
Pour into four 12-oz. glasses.
Garnish each with an orange slice or lime slice or kiwifruit or sugar cane, if you like.

name: Randy's Yuckaduck Pitcher
directions: Clean all the fruit, cut the ones in half that are indicated above, and cube the others.
Find a very large pitcher with closeable top - one of those plastic ones like Tupperware are good.  If your pitcher top has a strainer opening, that’s even better.

Place the ice cubes in the bottom of the pitcher, then the alcohol and fruit ingredients.  Add additional ice cubes or crushed ice to the top, but leave a little room so that the ingredients can move around.
Tightly close the pitcher so that no liquid will escape.
Get all your friends together around the campfire, along with their snacks and drinks.  Talk of good times, past, present, and future.
While you do, pass the closed pitcher around.  Have everybody shake the Yuckaduck a few times, shake it well! The shaking is fun, and it releases the juices from the fruit and mixes it all together.
When there’s a good amount of juice and alcohol mixed, pour the Yuckaduck and enjoy!  You can add more ingredients to keep it going.
Other fruit you can use:  raspberries, pineapple, grapes (cut in half), pears, mango, kiwi, etc.

name: Sweet Lime-Ginger Rum Punch
directions: In a small saucepan, bring the water, sugar and ginger to a boil.
Simmer over moderate heat for 5 minutes. Strain the syrup into a large pitcher, pressing hard on the ginger. Let cool to room temperature.
Stir in the lime juice, rum and the 2 cups of ice. Strain into ice-filled glasses and garnish with lime slices and cilantro.

name: Lemon-Lime Basil Ade
directions: Place all the ingredients in the Vita-Mix container or a heavy duty blender.
Slowly increase speed to high and process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Sarasota's Mango Lemonade With a Kick

name: Sangria Perea
directions: In a pitcher, add all the ingredients and stir to combine.
Ideally, you want to wait about 1 hour for the fruit and the wine to infuse each other, but you can drink it right away.

name: Drunken Watermelon
directions: With a knife, shave off the stem end of the watermelon, just enough so that it sits flat. Cut the top off the watermelon, about 3 inches down. Scoop out half of the watermelon with a melon baller and set aside.

Scoop out remaining watermelon, leaving the rind-bowl. This will be your punch bowl. Transfer scooped out melon (not the melon balls) to a blender and puree; may be done in batches. Push watermelon puree through a strainer to remove pulp and any seeds. Return watermelon water to the watermelon punch bowl. Stir in tequila, triple sec, and melon balls. Top off with lemon-lime soda. Serve cold over ice.

name: Cranberry Tea
directions: Mix all the ingredients together.
Note:There may be a residue at the bottom.

similar.name: Sparkling Cranberry Kiss  Taste of Home

name: Winter Wassail
directions: Tie first 3 ingredients together in a piece of cheesecloth or coffee filter.
Bring cider and sugar to a boil in a large saucepan.  Add spice bag; reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.  Remove spice bag and discard.
Stir in orange juice and remaining ingredients; simmer 5 minutes or until heated.  Serve hot.

name: Caribbean Castaway Punch
directions: Stir first 7 ingredients in large punch bowl.  Refrigerate until cold. (Can be made 6 hours ahead.  Keep refrigerated.).
Add block of ice or ice cubes to bowl with punch.  Ladle punch into glasses.

name: Mardi Gras Madness Punch
directions: Place ice ring in the bottom of your punch bowl.
Add the liquids in the order given and stir slightly.
Slice the oranges, lemons and limes and float the slices on top of the liquid mixture and ice ring.

name: Lime Green Punch
directions: In a container (at least 4 gallons), mix the KoolAid, sugar, water and juices and mix well.
Chill well.
You can then do one of two things, you can serve immediately in a punch bowl with an ice ring or you can put the punch into the freezer for 24 hours to allow it to become slushy.
If you chose the slushy method, you will need to allow time for a little thawing before serving.

name: Sorrel Drink
directions: Wash sorrel, cut away seeds.
Place in jar with orange peel & cloves.
Pour on boiling water.
Allow to remain for 24 hours.
Strain & sweeten with sugar.
Pour into bottles, adding few grains of rice (this helps fermentation).
Allow to remain for at least another day.
Serve with ice.

name: Soursop Punch
directions: wash & peel soursop.
Mash in bowl with lime peel.
gradually stir in 1 pint water.
mix well & strain  throuogh muslin cloth.
Add other 1/2 pint water , repeat process, making sure all flavour is out.
Add condensed milk to taste for sweetness.
Chill well before serving over Ice.

name: Sugar-Free Arnold Palmer
directions: dissolve the sweetner and the tea in the lemon juice.
stir in the water.
chill overnight to blend flavors.

name: Teaffee
directions: Prepare four cups coffee in your coffee maker.
Boil remainder of the water.
Place tea bags in water and steep five minites.
Combine the two and pour over ice.

name: Lavender Tea Lemonade
directions: In a large saucepan, bring 7 cups water to a low boil.
In a bowl, carefully pour 4 cups of the water over the lavender and let steep for 10 minutes before straining.
Pour the remaining 3 cups water over the sugar and stir until dissolved.
Combine the lavender and sugar mixtures in a pitcher and stir in the lemon juice. Serve over the ice.

similar.name: Sugar-Free Hot Peach Lemon Tea Mix

name: Terry's Applejack
directions: Heat the apple juice and apple cider together with the brown sugar until the sugar is dissolved.  Add Everclear; sample to ensure it is not too strong for your tastes.

I have trouble getting these ingredients so I use 3 liters of apple juice and boil it and the sugar with a few cinnamon sticks, some cloves, and a small chunk of ginger.  When it starts to smell like cider, remove from heat, then mix 1/2 liter of Everclear.  Pour the mixture into bottles, and chill.  DELICIOUS!

name: A Gruesome Brew
directions: Mix lemon juice and cider in a saucepan.
Put spices in a tea ball and add to cider.
